programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wells Fargo vs. Doc Holliday : A wounded Wells Fargo stage driver says Doc Holliday and Skunky Groggin robbed the stage.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Warpath : An Army officer is captured by Pawnee Indians who have left the reservation and bought faulty guns.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Hung Jury : Judge Tobin wants fast justice when a close and highly respected friend is found shot dead with a man holding the gun passed out in front of him.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Little Pistol : Earp and Doc capture a very young female outlaw called Little Pistol while tracking a band who robbed Doc's saloon.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Magic Puddle : Doc Holliday backs a couple who own land with an oil pit. However, the freighters are used to using the pit to grease their wheels resulting in gun fights over access to it.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Mr. Buntline's Vacation : Ned Buntline arrives in Dodge City broke looking for help from Earp who is happy to help in return for the Buntline special.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Fortitude : Earp is invited to speak at the Cattlemen's Convention at the Dodge City Opera House. But a source tells Kate Holliday that it is a setup by Texas cattlemen to kill Earp.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Good and Perfect Gift : A youngster who idolizes Doc Holliday wants to be like him forcing Earp and the Hollidays to try to change him.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Indian Wife : When a man insults and is shot by the Indian wife of a white man, Earp is forced to intercede between the couple and her father, Chief Two Moon.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Woman Trouble : A group of thieves posing as True Lighter missionaries are stopped outside Dodge City. The leader wants Jennie Brandt to flirt with Earp to learn the time of a Wells Fargo gold shipment.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Shadow of a Man : While away for the day helping Sheriff Masterson, Earp appoints Hal Norton as his Chief Deputy. Hal is forced to confront several problems while Earp is gone.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: One-Man Army : Texan Drum Denman goes after northerner Earp by backing a free newspaper to print false stories about Earp trying to draw him out of Dodge City.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Manly Art : A boxing promoter comes to Dodge City challenging men to fight Champ Starbuck for money.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Imitation Jesse James : A bandit is striking stagecoaches near Dodge City. Based on his description Earp and Hal are sure it is the imitation Jesse James who has never been convicted.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Kansas Lily : Lily Reeve known as the Kansas Lily arrives in Dodge City. After pulling a gun while gambling, she is arrested by Earp while Bat thinks she is a nice innocent lady.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt Earp Rides Shotgun : Earp is asked by Wells Fargo to ride shotgun to help catch the Purvis gang. Earp agrees but a grandmother complicates the situation when she refuses to wait for a later stage.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: When Sherman Marched Through Kansas : When word spreads through Dodge City that General Sherman would be making a stop there, havoc breaks out for Earp.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Hidden Agenda : Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Broken Trust : Murder-for-hire is a complex crime. Solving it means finding the killer, and whoever paid for the hit. In South Carolina a death first ruled accidental was no accident, but that was just the beginning.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Caught in the Act : Surveillance video is often the most precise witness to a crime. After three brutal murders were caught on tape in Alabama, the suspects fled the area. They had an arsenal of stolen weapons, and swore they wouldn't be taken alive.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The Predator : An Arizona girl's 1984 kidnapping leads the FBI on the trail of a key suspect.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Stranger : The body of a young woman found burned in a truck launched a manhunt to find her killer. When more bodies began to turn up across the country, the FBI believed the cases were linked. Investigators had a suspect. They just couldn't find him.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Crackdown : In the 1980s, the drug trade in New York City was a nightmare. Dealers made millions. Street violence was out of control. The NYPD battled the drug gangs only to become their target.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Human Prey : Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Home Invaders : Too often, convicted felons learn new techniques and find new partners in prison. In 1982, a group of former inmates began a spree of kidnapping and robbery.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Obsession : Power is a responsibility as well as a privilege. But in the wrong hands, power can corrupt. For former Deputy Attorney General for the State of Delaware, losing sight of his sworn oath to uphold justice could prove lethal.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Influence : In the 1980's, thousands of violent criminals flooded into America from Cuba and Colombia. Drugs hit South Florida and the area bloated with illicit wealth became a violent powder keg.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Death in Alaska : The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Cruel Revenge : A kidnapping can shatter a family, bringing terror and heartache without warning. In 1984 with the flash of a gun, an ordinary business transaction became a violent abduction. In seconds, the son of a wealthy Miami developer was gone.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Silent Strike : Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A Stranger in Town : She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Betrayed : Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Texas Rangers : Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Signed In Blood : Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Buried Secrets : Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Grave Secrets : Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lethal Obsessions : Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Misplaced Loyalty : In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Absent Witness : When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Blind Trust : A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Presumed Dead : What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Body Count : Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Mind Hunters : Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fatal Error : Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Left At The Scene : The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Chain Lightning : A fast-on-the-draw ex-con gets out of prison and is bent on killing Cisco and Bill Shannon for sending him there.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Challenge : Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Hawk : Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Three-Legged Terror : Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Angry Man : The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Woman : An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Eddie's Daughter : Eddie's daughter causes trouble for Lucas when two strangers threaten her life after she arrives with criminal information and stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Panic : Town character Brett Conway blackmails Lucas with the knowledge that a young couple Lucas rescued is suffering from yellow fever.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Ordeal : Lucas and Mark are stranded in the middle of a desert with very little food or water, and after Lucas is injured, Mark becomes the only hope for their survival.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: The Return of Jessie : Kekoa is devastated when Jessie tells JD that he’s the father of her child. A rescued bodyboarder is paralyzed. Sean has a romantic encounter with a beautiful, woman he thinks might really be Pele, the goddess fire.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Trapped : Investigating toxic dumping, Sean and Leigh end up chained inside a chamber slowly filling with toxic seawater. Can Sam get them out in time? To raise money, Jason and Zack have to hula dance in grass skirts in front of a lot of women.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Dead Reckoning : Leigh takes over at Baywatch while Sean, Jason, and Zack go to compete in a 12-mile race of natural obstacles. Jessie’s presence at the race creates turmoil. Leigh and Jenna pretend to be lesbian lovers.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Makapu'u Lighthouse : For a rescue, Sean is awarded a free week at Hilton Hawaiian Village, which he declines. Zack pretends he’s Sean and enjoys all the freebies until Sean shows up! A pretty fashion photographer thinks Jason has top model potential.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Rescue Me : Sean has a decision – move to Australia or stay in Hawaii. Zack sees Leigh naked, leading to complications with her fiancé Sam. Kekoa dumps JD and becomes a party girl. When Sam leaves Leigh at the altar, Sean asks Leigh to marry him instead.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Ex-Files : A series of fake rescue calls puts Sean, Jenna and Zack’s lives in danger. Jenna replaces Councilman McKenna, giving her the power to shut down the Training Center! JD tries to get Kekoa’s father to bless their relationship.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Father Faust : Baywatch faces two bizarre lawsuits. Kekoa’s father wants her to break up with JD and quit lifeguarding. Zack runs the new Junior Lifeguards program. A government Investigation puts Sean’s job and the future of the Training Center in jeopardy.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Good Man in a Storm : A hurricane hits Hawaii. Sean and Jenna get trapped in a WWII bunker and must put their hatred aside and work together to escape. Zack is trapped in headquarters with a thrill-seeking reporter that puts their lives in danger to get her story.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: My Father the Hero : Jenna invests all her money with an investment banker who turns out to be a con man. Derek Hart is the kind of man JD wishes he was. But when Derek jumps off a cliff, JD and Jason dive in to save his life, in more ways than one!

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Boiling Point : Zack corrupts the headquarters’ computer system forcing everyone to work in the Dark Ages. Sean is freaked because a major donor is about to arrive in the midst of chaos. Jason saves Brit from her ex.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rumours and Reputations : Recently diagnosed with a learning disorder, an embarrassed Liberty is ashamed to tell her friends about her tutoring sessions. Emma sees one of Liberty's private sessions and, putting two-and-two together with Liberty's suspicious behaviour, asks J.T.

programme.desc: Save the Pangaroo/Save the Cricket! : Save the Pangaroo/Save the Cricket!: The Wonder Pets help a kid-art pangaroo, a fictional animal that is part kangaroo, part parrot, who has been thrown away in the trash. A baby cricket in Chicago gets caught in a soap bubble and floats away.

programme.title: Wonder Pets
programme.desc: Kalamazoo/Save the Cow Who Jumped Over the Moon! : Kalamazoo/Save the Cow Who Jumped Over the Moon!: Ming-Ming visits her Aunt Eleanora at the local petting zoo during a school holiday. Eleanora asks Ming-Ming to take care of her toddler cousin, Marvin, for the afternoon.

programme.title: Wonder Pets
programme.desc: Save the Armadillo/Save the Itsy Bitsy Spider! : The Wonder Pets get a call from a baby armadillo who is afraid his Old West-style town is haunted! The Wonder Pets journey into a watercolor painting to save the Itsy Bitsy Spider who keeps getting washed away.

programme.title: Wonder Pets
programme.desc: Save the Gecko!/Save the What? : The Wonder Pets play hide and seek with a gecko in Costa Rica and return to the classroom to find that the precocious gecko! The Wonder Pets get a call from an animal in distress but their phone is broken!

programme.title: Wonder Pets
programme.desc: Save the Old White Mouse!/The Adventures of Bee and Slug! : The Wonder Pets travel to Linny's grandmother's local nursing home to rescue an old white mouse who's stuck in a cuckoo clock. Little Bee and Slug accidentally take the Flyboat for a ride that quickly gets out of control.

programme.title: Wonder Pets
programme.desc: Save the Griffin!/Save the Rooster! : Save the Griffin!/Save the Rooster!: The Wonder Pets must become brave knights to rescue a baby griffin in medieval England whose tail is stuck beneath a stone. The Wonder Pets travel to a farm to help a young rooster wake the farm before sunrise.

programme.title: Wonder Pets
programme.desc: Save the Rat Pack!/Save the Fiddler Crab on the Roof! : The Wonder Pets travel to Las Vegas to assist three performing rats who are having trouble working together on their song and dance routine. The Wonder Pets journey to a small village in old Russia to save a fiddler crab.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Hot Rocks : Sam and Rebecca are dressed-up for the USS Constitution tour, but their respective dates cancel.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: What's Up Doc? : Sam makes a move for a sex therapist, but gets turned down cold.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Gift Of The Woodi : Woody can't live up to the gift-giving expectations for his girlfriend's birthday.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Call Me Irresponsible : Carla questions her marriage when Eddie is a no-show on their anniversary.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sisterly Love : Rebecca and her estranged sister teach Sam a humiliating lesson.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Visiting Lecher : Frasier's colleague visits Boston and makes an enemy out of Rebecca.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Improbable Dream (Part 1) : Sam almost gets his chance at a date with Rebecca, until a handsome corporate raider steps in.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Improbable Dream (Part 2) : Rebecca takes a trip to Beverly Hills with Robin on his Lear jet.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A Bar Is Born : Sam considers opening a bar of his own to give his life purpose.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: How To Marry A Mailman : When Cliff accepts his girlfriend's marriage proposal, his fear of commitment turns him into a wreck.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Two Faces Of Norm : While Sam regrets the hasty sale of his Corvette, Norm learns that being the boss is harder than it looks.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam Ahoy : Sam, Carla and Norm set sail in Robin Colcord's boat, only to discover there's a live bomb on board.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Stork Brings A Crane : While the bar's patrons and management celebrate Cheers' 100-year anniversary, Lilith gives birth to a baby boy.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Death Takes A Holiday On Ice : Following Eddie's untimely death, Carla discovers her husband was two-timing her when she meets his other wife at the funeral.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: For Real Men Only : Frasier kidnaps his own son to keep him from being ritually circumcised in the Jewish tradition.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Two Girls For Every Boyd : The guys at Cheers have a beard-growing contest to test their manhood.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Art Of The Steal : When Rebecca's plan to surprise Robin Colcord with a romantic evening backfires, she ends up trapped in Robin's penthouse with Sam.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Feeble Attraction : While Norm's ex-secretary falls for Cliff, Rebecca searches for "hidden treasure" in a gift from Robin.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sammy And The Professor : Rebecca's favorite college professor comes to visit, and much to her disbelief, has a brief affair with Sam.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: What Is... Cliff Clavin : Cliff gets hauled off the stage when he's a contestant on Jeopardy.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Finally! (Part 1) : Rebecca finds out that she's not the only woman in Robin's love life.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Finally! (Part 2) : Rebecca finds out that she's not the only woman in Robin's love life.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody Or Won't He? : Woody's girlfriend's mother, a beautiful older woman, makes sexual advances toward him.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Severe Crane Damage : Frasier is upset when Lilith's new book labels him a boring, dependable "good boy."

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Indoor Fun With Sammy And Robby : Rebecca's plans for a romantic day with Robin are ruined when he opts to spend the day in a game of one-upmanship with Sam.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Fifty-Fifty Carla : Carla is consumed with guilt when she hides the money from her late husband's estate from his other widow.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Bar Wars III: Return Of Tecumseh : Then the gang notices that the bar's wooden statue of Tecumseh is missing. Their rival Gary is the suspected culprit.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Loverboyd : Woody gives Kelly a promise ring when her father arranges for her to go to Europe.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Ghost And Mrs. Lebec : Carla fears Eddie's ghost is haunting her when she decides to begin dating again.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Hobbit : Les enfants de South Park découvre Photoshop et son pouvoir d'amélioration physique. Et Wendy va tout faire pour montrer aux garçons que ce n'est pas la vérité.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Va te faire financer : Afin de ne plus être obligés d'aller à l'école ou de faire quoi que ce soit, Stan, Kyle, Cartman, Kenny et Butters décident de créer leur startup en utilisant Kickstarter pour la financer.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Ébola sans gluten : M. Mackey agace tout le monde à propos de son régime alimentaire sans gluten. Après avoir été témoins des risques liés au gluten, les habitants changent radicalement leur comportement alimentaire.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Cissy : Dans le but d'utiliser les toilettes des filles pour échapper aux toilettes bondés des garçons, Cartman annonce qu'il est transgenre. Pendant ce temps, Randy se démène avec sa double identité de Lorde.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Handicar : Le nouveau service de transport de Timmy destiné à recueillir des fonds pour le camp d'été lui fait beaucoup d'ennemis.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le buisson magique : Cartman découvre les drônes et en profite pour filmer l'intimité des habitants de South Park. Ce qui va entraîner une paranoïa autour de l'utilisation des drônes.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Jeux gratuits payants : Stan devient accro au nouveau jeu sur mobile produit par le Canada, mettant en scène Terrance et Philippe. L'application est dite 'gratuite' mais propose de dépenser de l'argent pour progresser dans le jeu.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Vindaloop au sol : Cartman a acheté l'Oculus Rift et les enfants ne savent plus s'ils sont dans le monde réel ou dans le monde virtuel.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Coq Magique : Kenny excelle dans le jeu de carte Magic : l'assemblée ou les combats de coqs font rage dans les milieux underground. Randy, pensant qu'il s'agit de tout autre chose mais se trompe.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: #RT : Ike ne veut plus jouer avec Kyle à Call of Duty et préfère regarder des personnes jouant et commentant le jeu sur YouTube

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: #hologrammesheureux : Les hologrammes de stars décédées envahissent la télévision : le monde court à la catastrophe dont il ne pourrait jamais se relever.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Magnifique et courageuse : Les garçons expriment tout le respect qu'ils ont pour Caitlyn Jenner dans cette épisode de la série South Park, plus magnifique et courageuse que jamais.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Où est passé mon pays ? : M. Garrison veut construire un mur pour tenir à distance les immigrants sans papiers.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Une ville idéale : La ville de South Park entreprend d'importantes rénovations. De son côté, Kenny pense qu'il est temps pour lui de chercher un travail.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: On n'accepte pas les critiques : Cartman est persuadé d'être le meilleur critique gastronomique du net que South Park ait connu.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Dans ma bulle : Cartman se fait humilier sur les réseaux sociaux à cause de son poids.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Tweek et Craig : Les élèves asiatiques de l'école représentent en peinture l'amour imaginaire entre Tweek et Craig.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Les méchants ninjas : Les habitants de South Park ne veulent plus de policiers dans leur ville.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Contenu de marque : Jimmy, le rédacteur en chef du journal de l'école, se heurte à l'opinion un peu obtue de Principal PC.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La vérité sur les publicités : Principal PC disparaît avec deux élèves de CM1.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le jugement final de Principal PC : Kyle mène son combat aux côtés d'une alliée dangereuse au détriment de son amitié avec Stan.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Rappel-baies : La poire à lavement devance le sandwich au caca dans la course à la présidence, et cela ne l'arrange pas. J.J. Abrams a pour mission de faire un reboot de l'hymne américain et Kyle veut démasquer le troll qui harcèle les filles de l'école

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Chasse aux garces : Le troll chasseauxgarces42 sévit toujours. Les filles sont de plus en plus remontées et menacent les garçons de répliquer si le harcèlement continue. Ceux-ci sont persuadés que Cartman est responsable et ils comptent bien l'arrêter.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Les âmes perdues : Tous deux privés de technologie, Cartman et Heidi se lient d'amitié. La guerre est ouverte entre Freja Ollegard et chasseauxgarces42 qui a peur d'être découvert. M. Garrison fait tout pour ne pas être élu président.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Les zizis sont de sortie : Alors que Kyle soutient les filles, Butters préfère mener la révolte des garçons. Kyle demande l'aide de Cartman, mais ce dernier refuse. L'identité de Gerald a été découverte par un autre troll qui le met en garde face aux Danois.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Une pâtisserie pour les danois : Les trolls s'unissent pour contrecarrer les plans des Danois. Cartman et Heidi encouragent les élèves de l'école à se serrer les coudes, tandis que M. Garrison s'attire la colère de ses sympathisants.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Fort-Collins : Cartman et Heidi révèlent leur plan à Kyle. Grâce à Heidi, les Danois lancent leur site. Un premier troll est découvert à Fort Collins. Randy et M. Garrison tentent de détruire sans succès les Rappel-baies qui passent alors à l'action.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Oh, punaise ! : Le pays est sous le choc du résultat des élections. Gerald est envoyé en mission secrète au Danemark par Mme Clinton afin d'utiliser le site anti-trolls contre M. Garrison. Bill Clinton et Bill Cosby font la morale aux élèves de l'école.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Réservé aux membres : Les Rappel-baies envahissent la Maison-Blanche. M. Garrison prend ses fonctions mais ne sait pas quoi faire face à l'attaque des Danois. Gerald force Ike à troller à sa place. Cartman et Heidi font la queue pour aller sur Mars.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Pas drôle : Kyle convainc les habitants de South Park de demander au président de bombarder le Danemark, mais le regrette très vite. Gerald obtient un entretien avec le soi-disant chasseur de trolls danois. Cartman a peur de perdre Heidi.

programme.title: Idiotest
programme.desc: High School Sweethearts vs. Friends : Comedian Ben Gleib hosts as high school sweethearts compete against friends to answer increasingly difficult brain teaser puzzles.

programme.desc: Fun Family vs. Engaged Couple : Comedian Ben Gleib hosts as a woman and her nephew compete against an engaged couple to answer increasingly difficult brain teaser puzzles.

programme.title: America Says

programme.title: Emogenius

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Taste the Rainbow : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. A dater must choose between women whose baggage includes dating all genders and loving the taste of dog meat.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Passion for Fashion : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. A dater must choose between women whose baggage includes burping when hungry and spending half her income on Christian Dior.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Fantasy Date : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. A dater must choose between men whose baggage includes fantasizing about Oprah and having a non-human friend named Mr. Chill.

programme.title: Baggage on the Road
programme.desc: Don’t Trust a Guy Like Me : Jerry Springer travels to Baton Rouge to help LSU alumni look for love. As daters present their negative qualities first, club promoter Niko must decide if he can accept a woman who practices an uncommon religion.

programme.title: Baggage on the Road
programme.desc: I Like 'em Bad : Jerry Springer travels to Baton Rouge to help LSU art major Bryant search for love. As fellow Tigers reveal their hidden secrets, Bryant must decide which is too much for him: an unbecoming habit or an unusual fetish.

programme.title: Divided

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Always on My Mind : Martin examines Helen Pratt, but she collapses and dies. Her husband, Phil, is angry with the doctor and blames him for his wife's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Holy Terror : This episode documents a deadly bombing at a church in Oakwood, Illinois, in December 1997.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Church Disappearance : In 1981, 6-year-old Cassie Hansen disappeared from her Minnesota church during an evening service. After receiving a tip that an older man was seen carrying a small person, police found Cassie's body in a dumpster.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Last Dance : In 2000, the body of exotic dancer Rachel Siani was found beneath a New Jersey bridge. Investigators wondered if she had committed suicide. They discovered that Rachel offered to assist a drunk customer named John "Jack" Denofa to his motel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sign Here : A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fire Dot Com : In 1996, a federal agency ruled that Terri Strickland had intentionally set the fire that killed her 17-month-old son, Josh Hinson. Using the then-emerging resources of the internet, Strickland undertook her own investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: Frozen Assets : In 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery was found brutally murdered at her Illinois business. Investigators had to determine if this was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dancing with the Devil : In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dessert Served Cold : A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Sniper's Trail : An examination of the 2002 DC area shooting spree that resulted in ten murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Elemental Clue : When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Brotherly Love : In 1969, 25-year-old phone operator Diane Maxwell was raped and murdered. Her brother promised he'd find out who was responsible and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tagging a Suspect : Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mistaken For Dead : In 1988, when a patient dies unexpectedly in the office of California neurologist Richard Boggs, police begin what they think will be a routine investigation. Soon they uncover a bizarre story of corpse stealing, fake identity and sexual perversion.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Freeze Framed : In 2005, David Castor suffered a slow, agonizing death over a period of days. His wife maintained it was suicide, even though it was done with antifreeze.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Crime Seen : Edward Honaker was convicted of rape, sodomy and aggravated sexual battery and sentenced to three life terms in prison. He maintained his innocence. After years in prison and writing countless letters, he finally found someone who believed him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Hell's Kitchen : When Kristine Fitzhugh failed to show up for her music class, her husband found her dead at the bottom of the stairs of their Palo Alto home. Further investigation reveals evidence of murder in the kitchen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Breaking the Mold : A three-year-old develops a respiratory condition. His father has Alzheimers. An investigator reveals that their ill health is due to mold in their modern home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dirty Little Secret : Police get a clue about a couple who disappeared on Memorial Day weekend during an in-progress robbery. The evidence found solves a brutal crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Brotherhoods : Two men are murdered while sleeping in their beds. The next night, arson destroys a family planning clinic. Investigators wonder whether some shards of glass, paint chips and a chicken feather could link what appear to be two separate crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Concrete Alibi : An aspiring model turned up dead and the prime suspect was her boyfriend. When he was eventually cleared, investigators had to dig deeper to find the perpetrator. With the help of a forensic geologist, they identified the most unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Beaten by a Hair : In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Watchful Eye : On May 20, 2001, Carrie Nelson was beaten to death while working alone in a park office. The case went unsolved for six years. Finally, police found a match with DNA samples gathered from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sphere of Influence : When an 11-year-old girl disappears from a remote Alaska town, investigators wonder if she has been attacked by a bear or become lost in the dense woods. Eventually, they realize that neither assumption is true.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Talking Skull : In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a Boy Scout Camp near Farmington, Missouri. Facial reconstruction aids the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: House Hunting : In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Grounds for Indictment : A drive-by shooting leaves one man dead and another seriously wounded. Cell phone calls and shell casings point to a suspect, but authorities are unable to place him at the crime scene. A forensic geologist proves that dirt is anything but dumb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Video Diary : When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sign of the Crime : In little more than a month, two women who lived in the same apartment complex were brutally murdered. The similarities of the crime scenes led police to conclude they were dealing with a serial killer who harbored an intense hatred of women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Voice from Beyond : When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Insect Clues : Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Death of the Small Coppers : A butterfly collector is found pinned to a wall like one of his specimens.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Drawing Dead : A festival is in full swing when the village is shocked by a supermodel's murder. With a comic shaming several people as his only lead, Barnaby is left trying to uncover the truth.

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Prisoners in Paradise : When Lois McMillen, a Connecticut artist was found dead on the British Virgin Island of Tortola in January 2000, four young American tourists were charged with her brutal murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Blue River Murder : A report on the investigation into the 2010 death of Stephanie Roller, a Colorado mother of three who allegedly went for a walk during a blizzard and was later found dead in a nearby river.

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Terror at the Morgue : Dr. O.C. Smith, a medical examiner, was apparently attacked on June 1, 2002, as he was leaving work. He was found wrapped in barbed wire with a bomb strapped to his neck. Dr. Smith survived but expressed concern that his assailant might attack again

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules

programme.title: Income Property

programme.desc: Connie and Sebastian : Connie and Sebastian are hands on first-time homeowners. This 100-year-old Victorian semi-detached used to be a rooming house. The bubbly couple got rid of most of the evidence from the previous apartments, but...

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Elliot : Elliot bought his first home and has big dreams for it. Unfortunately bigger isn’t always better. His elaborate plans are taking way too long and costing way too much. Scott is going to show him how to spruce it up.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Heather : Heather is a teacher who bought a newly renovated bungalow with a 'ready to rent' two-bedroom basement apartment but a home inspection revealed some minor fixes for which Heather set aside over $20,000.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Jay and Kathryn : When Jay and Kathryn moved into their new home they never thought they would outgrow it so fast! With two kids in the family space is at a premium. Kathryn and Jay need an income suite to increase the value.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Kirk & Stephanie : Kirk and Stephanie bought their dream house 3 years ago, and they intend to keep the basement as an income suite to give them long-term security.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Martin & Isadora : Martin and Isidora have found their dream home, but the basement needs a lot of work. Closing date has been pushed up by 3 months, and they have already promised their tenant she can move into their basement apartment.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Peter : Peter purchased an expensive, fully renovated Victorian in a hip downtown neighbourhood last year. Adding a potential rental suite in the basement was his plan and the key to bringing down his substantial mortgage.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Samantha & Andrew : Samantha and Andrew were smart enough to buy their first home with a fully functioning basement apartment already built-in. They were told the previous owner had been renting the basement for $800 a month.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Sean & Ania : Sean bought his semi-detached, former boarding house with the intent of converting it into a duplex to help pay the mortgage. Disaster struck within 48 hours of moving in, when the drain in the basement overflowed.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Shawn & Sarah : Expecting their first baby in nine weeks, Shawn and Sarah thought ahead when they bought their first home, purchasing one with an existing basement apartment. They figured they would need the income to pay the mortgage.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Steve : When Steve was searching for his first home, he knew exactly what he wanted: a triplex that would bring in double the rental income. For the past four years Steve has successfully rented out two units, but...

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Finders Keepers : When a multi-million dollar racing yacht sinks during a race, Don and his team are called to investigate after the treasure hunt to find the wreckage turns deadly.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Twelve Worried Persons : When a juror dies during Susan's first big trial as lead attorney, Margaret and Todd work to exonerate Amy, a juror from the same trial suspected of the murder. Also, Margaret's sister Patty is in town and sparks fly between Todd and Amy.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: The First Date Is the Deepest : Margaret helps a client who lost his mother during a routine surgery at Allison's hospital, performed by her colleague Dr. Ross Woods (Benjamin Hollingsworth). Also, Margaret and Gus go on their first date and Todd is asked by the firm to investigate Gus.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Gloom and Boom : When a stranger with a bomb appears at the law firm demanding Margaret reverse her efforts to free her client on death row or the bomb will detonate, Margaret and Todd must rely on their legal and detective skills to untangle the crime.

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: Shell Game : The CSI team investigates a case where an ambitious investigative reporter is found dead at a peanut factory. Also, everyone in the crime lab buzzes over who Max will promote to day shift supervisor.

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: Dying Words : The CSI team investigates a murder case that hits close to home for Folsom. When he is forced to sit this investigation out, he does his own digging with help from Trey.

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: The Reaper : With their respected colleague Josh Folsom under arrest for the death of Kahn Schefter, the CSI team combs through every crumb of forensic evidence to determine his innocence or guilt.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: Paniolo : When a beloved Paniolo (Hawaiian cowboy) is shot while out riding his horse, Jane and her team must gain the trust of the Paniolo community to help find the culprits and protect the Paniolo's life.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: Gaijin : When a Japanese sailor is killed on American soil and evidence links the case to the previous murder of the victim's girlfriend back in Japan, NCIS must find the murderer before the wrong person is accused and the case triggers a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Take Out : Don and his team investigate a rash of deadly restaurant robberies.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: End of Watch : Don and the FBI re-open a 17-year-old unsolved case when the badge of a missing LAPD officer, who is presumed dead, is found at a construction site.

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: 86'd : Margaret represents Lauren (Jamie Chung), Susan's good friend, in a hostile work environment lawsuit after she quits her job at a Michelin-starred restaurant, but it unexpectedly turns into a murder trial when the head chef is found dead.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd

programme.title: So Help Me Todd

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: Shell Game : The CSI team investigates a case where an ambitious investigative reporter is found dead at a peanut factory. Also, everyone in the crime lab buzzes over who Max will promote to day shift supervisor.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: Blood on the Staircase : A look at the controversial case of North Carolina author Michael Peterson, convicted of murdering his wife, a high powered business executive.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: A Confession in Question : After 17 years in prison, Marty Tankleff is finally free and his almost-two-decade tragic journey has ended and become national news. 19 years ago, 17-year-old Marty was accused of murdering his parents.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: Episode 3 : American Justice looks at some of the most notorious cases of police killings in recent times.

programme.title: American Justice

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: The City Killer-Gangs : The Prohibition Act of 1919 turns the petty vice and extortion gangs into criminal armies and helps sow the seeds of what will become the great crime syndicates. Brooklyn D.A. Charles Hynes is interviewed.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: The Kidnappers : By the mid-1930s, law enforcement is outgunned and uncoordinated. Any state line provides a sanctuary for a fleeing hoodlum, setting the stage for a kidnapping wave.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: Maria/Jerry/Melissa : Maria feared for her safety as one of her fellow employees at the hospital where she worked became increasingly volatile.

programme.title: I Survived . . .

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: The Mystery of Disembodied Feet : The summer of 2007, a young girl walks on the beach and a human foot in a sneaker. Less than a week later, a couple discovers another running shoe with a foot inside of it south of there. Thus begins the mystery of the disembodied feet.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Rowdy Roddy Piper, Skylar Grey, Frank Whaley : After Rowdy's best friend Adrian Adonis dies tragically, Rowdy learns that Adrian has his back even from the beyond. Skylar Grey, at a low point in her career, is viciously attacked by an evil spirit in her hotel room.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Aaron Carter, Chris McDonald, Kaya Jones, David Proval : Aaron Carter's dying grandmother makes him promise her that he will perform a ritual after she dies to prove that spirits really do exist.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Tito Ortiz, Cary Elwes. Sally Kellerman, Drake Bell : One of the toughest men in the world, Tito Ortiz, encounters a spirits that terrifies him and his girlfriend. Cary Elwes has a brush with a bone chilling skeletal ghost.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Tiffany, Tony Plana, Morgan Brittany : An angry teenage Tiffany reads the Satanic bible and unleashes evil from the other side. Tony Plana encounters a cannibalistic entity that leaves him fearing for his life.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Lorenzo Lamas, Charles Schaughnessy, Kristen Renton : Lorenzo Lamas comes face to face with the spirit of a famous actress who is trying to contact his mother. Charles Schaughnessy encounters an angry poltergiest.

programme.title: Paranormal State
programme.desc: The Raven : Debra and Gil invite Ryan and his team into their seaside Delaware home for this unusual haunting. Debra has been choked, and fears an evil entity.

programme.title: Paranormal State
programme.desc: Ghosts of Gettysburg : When a Civil War enthusiast and his wife began renovating an historic B&B, they apparently stirred up more than just memories.

programme.title: Paranormal State
programme.desc: Three Like Mine : Heather, Matt and their three kids are being harassed nightly by an entity in their Indiana home. Heather has been shaken by a force that says, "Hey".

programme.title: Paranormal State
programme.desc: Dead and Back : Viki suffered a brain aneurism that left her on the brink of death. She fears the experience may have opened her up to unwanted spirits in her Alabama home.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Demon's Revenge : Tiffany McKinnon, her boyfriend and his 7-year-old daughter move into a 200-year-old farmhouse Franklin, VA. Tiffany discovers that the spirit of a freed slave is haunting the home and is determined to make peace with him.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: The Shadowman : Tim Yancey and his older brother Tom love playing in the woods surrounding their Florida home. One afternoon Tom senses a presence watching him from among the shadows. Days later, the same entity confronts Tim and chases him through the woods.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Demon Unearthed : In the small town of Garden Grove, Iowa, Jennifer and Norman Rice with their son Andrew, purchase a majestic 19th century mansion. Soon after, Jennifer and Andrew begin experiencing paranormal activity while Norman is out of town on business.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Devil Inside Me : When John Drenner, Jr. finds a satanic bible, he unwittingly unleashes a sinister demon. The entity threatens John with violent physical attacks. Minister Bill Bean must act swiftly to perform a powerful exorcism and oust the demon before it’s too late.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Evil Never Dies : Jennifer Hoke’s family found their dream home along the waterfront in Florida; little do they know something dark is lurking in their dream house. What starts as strange noises escalates to physical attacks. The family turns to a local empath for answers.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Ashes To Evil : Soon after moving in a large apartment in Hampton, Tennessee, Amelia’s family can’t shake the feeling that they are not alone. An evil entity lurks in their dream home and is targeting family members. They turn to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Ghost Fury : Shortly after Alicia and Scott Cain move into a farmhouse in the quiet Ohio countryside, they learn their home was the site of a brutal murder decades earlier. Plagued by the ghosts of this horrific event, they call in the Fourman Brothers to investigate.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Nightmare In The Attic : The Fox family moves into a large old house in Lowell, Arkansas. Soon after, an angry ghost and demon begin to target the children, in their waking hours and in their dreams. The Fox family turns to a psychic, who confirms their worst nightmares.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Child’s Play : The loving spirit of Chris' late grandmother is watching over his close-knit family. But she is trying to warn them: a fierce and relentless demon has crept into their home. Chris reaches out to a paranormal team and a demonologist to battle the demon.

programme.desc: The Strongest Creature! One of the Four Emperors - Kaido, King of the Beasts! : As Sabo departs, our attention shifts to the other Straw Hats waging a fierce battle on a mysterious island. And a new drama is set into motion as ill portents fall from the sky!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fujitora Takes Action! The Complete Siege of the Straw Hats! : As Luffy and the others begin to come to their senses, major players in the Navy arrive to search Dressrosa for the Straw Hats! Also, Rebecca's history is whitewashed with a fake cover story - but why?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A State of Emergency! Rebecca Is Kidnapped! : Fujitora's flirting with chance has turned out poorly for the Straw Hats as the full Navy force bears down on Dressrosa searching for the pirates! Luffy and the others make a mad dash for the east port to get off the island.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Bond Between Father and Daughter! Kyros and Rebecca! : Rebecca has precious little time to follow Luffy's lead and make it to Kyros. Can she make it in time? Meanwhile, Fujitora is closing in on Bartolomeo and the other Colosseum warriors while Trafalgar Law faces the shadows of his past!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Men's Pride! Luffy vs. Fujitora, Head-to-Head! : Law and Sengoku share memories of Corazon, and the secret of Trafalgar Law's name. Meanwhile, Fujitora uses the destruction caused by the battle in Dressrosa as a weapon, and squares off one-on-one with Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: No Way Out! Admiral Fujitora's Ruthless Pursuit! : The people of Dressrosa show their appreciation to the Straw Hats one last time by foiling Fujitora's strategy. As Luffy and the others are able to finally make their break from the island, however, an unbelievable new chapter opens in the story.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sons' Cups! The Straw Hat Fleet is Formed! : With newfound allies won in the battle at Dressrosa, and as the Navy watches, Luffy and the Straw Hats depart Dressrosa for open water. But will Luffy accept the oath of allegiance given by his new fleet?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Numerous Rivals Struggle Amongst Themselves! The Raging Monsters of the New World : While the Straw Hats are underway, Doflamingo has serious predictions for the upset of the world order! Meanwhile, the recent actions in Dressrosa have led to surprising results!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Silver Fortress! Luffy and Barto's Great Adventure! : While heading to the next island, Zou, Luffy's appetite causes them trouble and he and Bartolomeo find themselves entangled in the scheme of a pirate lord who can manipulate silver.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An Underground Maze! Luffy vs. the Tram Human! : The Tram-Man arrives! And has Luffy, Bartolomeo and Desire on the run! The deeper the three fall into the pit, however, the more clear it becomes that Bill's group hides a terrible secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Sword Technique Heats Up! Law and Zoro Finally Appear! : Luffy, Bartolomeo, and Desire make their way up the mineshaft, but Bill's assassin, Peseta, has other plans! Just when the going gets tough, help arrives, and Zoro battles the assassin head on!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Desperate Situation! Luffy Fights a Battle in Extreme Heat! : Luffy, Desire, and Bartolomeo go up against Bill! But the mad, Smelt-Smelt man becomes deranged and lets his true power unfurl! Do Luffy and the others have any hope of exposing Bill's self-serving aims and turning his gang against him?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Curtain-up on a New Adventure! Arriving at the Phantom Island, Zou! : Bartolomeo recounts the formation of the Straw Hats, sharing their moving story with the rest of his crew! Meanwhile, the mysterious island of Zou approaches in the distance, obscured by fog. But when the haze clears, no one is expecting what they see!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The New Warlord! The Legendary Whitebeard's Son Appears! : Luffy and the others arrive at the mysterious land of Zou, and find the Sunny. But when they board, they find the other Straw Hats have already disembarked. Thus, Luffy, Zoro, Robin and the others take on the challenge of climbing the monstrous elephant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Deadly Elephant Climb! A Great Adventure on the Back of the Giant Elephant! : Finally scaling the elephant's back, the Straw Hats continue their search for the other half of their crew! But the mysterious "island" on the back of the elephant may hold more danger than they bargained for, as they learn they are not alone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Battle Begins! Luffy vs. the Mink Tribe! : Luffy pushes deeper into the mysterious forest on the elephant's back, but he's treading in territory where is not welcome! Meanwhile, Usopp and the others make a startling discovery in a ruined city!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Garchu! The Straw Hats Reunite! : Luffy and the others survive the Rain-Ruption and learn of its vital role in maintaining life on Zou.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Start to Counterattack! Great Moves by the Twirly Hat Crew! : Luffy and the others are unexpectedly welcomed at the fortress and treated well by the Minks, although they have to navigate some cultural differences… And Nami starts sharing what happened to them after they left Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Threat Descends! The Beast Pirates, Jack! : Luffy and the others learn about the dangerous intruders who have come to Zou, and why the island is wrecked! Afterwards, Luffy's loose lips get them into trouble!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The King of the Day! Duke Dogstorm Appears! : Duke Dogstorm - the Straw Hats finally meet the ruler of this strange land, and learn more about the battle that took place here; and the mysterious system by which the island is ruled!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The King of the Night! Master Cat Viper Emerges! : Day turns to night as the Minks keep up their onslaught against the invading Beast Pirates! But Jack's amazing Devil Fruit power may end the elephant island once and for all!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Exterminated Capital! The Twirly Hat Crew Arrive! : Night and day, Jack faces the fury of the two sworn defenders of Zou, but while they put up a good fight, the Minks aren't able to subdue Jack, especially after he brings out his secret weapon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Time Limit Closes in! The Bond Between the Mink Tribe and the Crew! : In the aftermath of Jack's deadly attack on the island of Zou, Chopper and Sanji rush in to save the fallen Mink Tribe - but they will need the help of Caesar to overcome the poisonous effects of the gas!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Delinquent Comes Home! Emperor Big Mom's Assassins! : More of the dramatic happenings on Zou are revealed as we learn that Jack's pirate band were not the only visitors to the elephant island! And what about the mysterious fate of Sanji?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Truth Behind the Disappearance! Sanji Gets a Startling Invitation! : The mystery of Sanji's disappearance deepens as Luffy learns that Big Mom's lackeys have caught up with him and the rest - and carry with them an invitation from Big Mom that simply can't be refused!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: To My Buds! Sanji's Farewell Note! : Sanji's dire situation has become clear, but instead of rallying against Big Mom's crew, he submits to go along with them to bring an end to this situation. But being separated from one of his crew is more than Luffy is willing to tolerate!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Let's Go and Meet Master Cat Viper! : There's only one key to finding out what happened to Sanji - and Luffy and the others make their way towards finding out more about their friend's disappearance, but on their way the indigenous fauna give them trouble!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Pirate Adventure - HOUR SPECIAL : Dora's Pirate Adventure: Yo ho ho! Dora and Boots and all their friends are putting on a pirate show today for their mommies and daddies.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Lost and Found : Lost and Found: Dora and Boots find a little baby blue bird who fell out of her nest.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Hic-Boom-Ohhh : Hic-Boom-Ohhh: What's that funny sound coming from Yellow Valley? Dora and Boots set off to investigate. They'll have to go across the Noisy River, then tiptoe through the Quiet Forest, and that's how they'll get to Yellow Valley to find the sound.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Ice Cream : Ice Cream: Deedle dee dee! Dora and Boots hear the ice cream truck nearby, but they just miss it.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Choo Choo : Choo Choo: All aboard! It's time for the big train race. First train to the Big Yellow Station wins a big whistle.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Treasure Island : Treasure Island: Dora and Boots find a blue key; it turns out it's the key to a big treasure chest.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Three L'il Piggies : Three L'il Piggies: Dora and Boots are at the farm today, bringing presents to the three little piggies.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Big River : Big River: Boots loses one of his shiny red boots in the Big River. Dora and Boots set off on a wild water adventure as they chase the runaway boot.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Berry Hunt : Berry Hunt: Dora and Boots go hunting for blueberries on Blueberry Hill. But they'll have to be careful--Swiper the fox lives on Blueberry Hill!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: WizzleWishes : WizzleWishes: Dora and Boots meet Wizzle who lost his bag of wishes and can't get home. Our heroes, Dora and Boots, set off in search of the lost wishes.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora the Explorer : Grandma's House: Dora and Boots set off to deliver a basket of treats to Dora's Abuela to help her cold. Dora's mother warns her to watch out for Swiper the Fox. He'll swipe the treats.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Surprise : Surprise: It's Boots' birthday! Dora tells him that all his friends are waiting at her house to give Boots a big party.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Sticky Tape : Sticky Tape: Benny the Bull needs some Sticky Tape in a hurry. His hot air balloon is leaking, and floating toward Crocodile Lake! Dora and Boots rush off to rescue their friend.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Bouncing Ball : Bouncing Ball: Boots buys a super blue bouncy ball at the store, but it bounces off down the hill.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Backpack : Backpack: Dora remembers the first time she met her friend Backpack. Backpack is helping Dora carry her books back to the Library. Can they reach the Library before it closes?

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Bugga Bugga : Bugga Bugga: Dora and Boots offer to help Mama Bugga Bugga bring a giant cookie home to feed her babies.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Fish Out of Water : Fish Out of Water: Dora and Boots go on an underwater adventure that takes them all the way to the bottom of the ocean.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Little Star : Little Star: Dora and Boots are getting ready to make a wish on the first star in the sky when the star falls! It's up to Dora and Boots to bring Little Star back home to the Moon.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Saves the Prince : Dora Saves the Prince: Dora and Boots must go into a storybook to rescue a prince from a wicked witch.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Big Red Chicken : The Big Red Chicken: Dora and Boots read about a chicken that's as big as a house and set off on an educational adventure to meet him.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: El Coquí : El Coqui: In this version of the famous Puerto Rican legend, Dora and Boots find a sad, homesick little coqui who's lost his voice. Dora and Boots offer to take the frog home to his island.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Stuck Truck : Stuck Truck: Calling all trucks! Boots sure loves trucks. When Ice Cream Truck gets stuck in the muck at Play Park, Dora and Boots are off to the rescue. Boots uses his truck phone to call his other truck friends for help along the way.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Louder! : Louder!: What are we going to do? Cockledoodledoo! Dora and Boots help their friend, Red Rooster, get to the Highest Hill so he can wake up the Sun. Along the way we practice making lots of noise.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Roberto The Robot : Roberto The Robot: Dora and Boots meet Roberto, a very cool robot with a tool belt, flashing lights, stretching powers and super strength. But Roberto's lost!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Big Potato : The Big Potato: Benny the Bull finds a magic wand and turns himself into a potato by mistake. Oh no! It's up to Dora and Boots to bring their potato friend back to the Young Wizard so that he can change Benny back into a bull again.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Journey To The Purple Planet : Journey To The Purple Planet: Blast into outer space as Dora and Boots set off to bring stranded space creatures back home to the Purple Planet. Take a wild ride on a rocketship, travel through the Milky Way, and catch a ride on a comet.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Lost City : The Lost City: Where do toys go when they're lost? To the Lost City! But the Lost City is really hard to find. Dora and Boots are on an educational, Indiana Jones-like adventure as they race through the Number Pyramid and the Jumbled Jungle.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 7 Chefs Compete (Part One) : The remaining chefs must cook three dishes for special guest judges, but there's a catch: they have just $35 and fifteen minutes to shop for ingredients.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 7 Chefs Compete (Part Two) : The remaining chefs prepare a dinner service for special guests from Oxfam America, including Academy Award-nominee Minnie Driver ("Good Will Hunting”).

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 6 Chefs Compete : The chefs travel to the Los Angeles Memorial Coliseum and cook gourmet versions of tailgate favorites for USC football fans. The dish voted best by a group of fifty fans wins.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 5 Chefs Compete : Using discarded everyday objects, a rock band treats the contestants to a musical number. The chefs are then given thirty minutes to make restaurant-ready dishes from leftovers.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 4 Chefs Compete : The remaining chefs participate in the "taste it, now make it" challenge. The winner dines out with guests; the losers move furniture and prep the kitchen for dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Winner Chosen : The final two chefs attend an L.A. night club to compete in their final challenge: prepare two appetizers and three entrées in one hour. Five iconic chefs will judge the dishes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 18 Chefs Compete : The new contestants form two teams and make their signature dishes for Chef Ramsay. A large audience looks on at the Cinerama Dome theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 17 Chefs Compete : This episode's challenge? Re-create Chef Ramsay's geoduck sashimi. The team that prepares fifteen perfect dishes gets a pool break while the losing team makes dinner for everyone.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 16 Chefs Compete : In a challenge to improve communication skills, Chef Ramsay gives each contestant a jacket with a recipe printed on the back, which they need to rely on their teammates to read.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 15 Chefs Compete : The teams serve brunch to a class of graduating culinary students. The winners fly to San Francisco to dine at Atelier Crenn; the losers grind and stuff chorizo sausages.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 14 Chefs Compete : The chefs must identify mystery proteins and match them to dishes. The winners meet Olympic gold medalists at the Annenberg Community Beach House.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 13 Chefs Compete : The contestants split into pairs and capture animals. The chefs have to prepare a side to go with the protein that they just caught.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 12 Chefs Compete : The teams create six Italian opera-inspired dishes. The winners go on a shopping spree at American Rag Cie, while the losers break down squid for a squid-ink tortellini dish.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 11 Chefs Compete (Part One) : Dogs and trainers from American Kennel Club drop by Hell's Kitchen. Meanwhile, the teams create a tasting menu consisting of two appetizers and three entrées.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 11 Chefs Compete (Part Two) : The teams participate in a "Hell's Kitchen craps" challenge. The winners take a private jet to Las Vegas and stay at the Planet Hollywood resort and casino.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 9 Chefs Compete : After an impressive Bollywood dance performance, Ramsay challenges the chefs to make Indian cuisine. The winners get a spa day while the losers prepare for the dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 8 Chefs Compete : The remaining contestants take the annual blind taste test. The winners enjoy a day of rest and relaxation at the Santa Monica Pier, while the losers clean the dorms and kitchens.
