programme.desc: Ruby's Memory Quilt/Lights Camera Ruby/Ruby's Ping Pong Record : Ruby wants to make a memory quilt./Ruby wants to make 'a day in the life' movie for Grandma. Max just wants to teach Froggy tricks.

programme.title: Max & Ruby
programme.desc: Max's Sprinkler/Max's Pogo Stick/Space Bunny : Ruby wants to have a perfect Summer Fashion Party/Ruby wants to surprise Grandma by planting daisies in her garden./Ruby wants to make a scrapbook for Grandma while Max is acting out the adventures of 'Space Bunny!'

programme.title: Max & Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby's Tower/ Ruby's Juice Bar/ Max's Tree Fort : Ruby wants to build a pasta tower as tall as she is./Ruby's wants to sell juice to make money for the Bunny Scouts./Ruby wants to spot three types of wildlife. Max wants just to build a tree fort.

programme.title: Max & Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby's Perfect Tree/ Max's Christmas Presents/ Max and Ruby's Christmas Carol : Ruby wants to find the perfect Christmas tree./Ruby wants to make all-natural Christmas tree decorations. Max wants Presents./Ruby wants to practice their special Bunny Christmas carol.

programme.title: Lead With Your Heart
programme.desc: Lead With Your Heart : After forgetting his wedding anniversary, Ben Walker scrambles to make a dinner reservation and buy a gift for his wife, Maura. When Ben calls Maura to tell her about the reservation she realizes that she forgot.

programme.title: Over the Moon in Love
programme.desc: Over the Moon in Love : With her match-making business on the verge of closing, Brooklyn finds herself in the unique position to be featured in a magazine, but has to set up the writer with her childhood friend Devin.

programme.title: The Love Club: Sydney
programme.desc: The Love Club: Sydney : Former star track athlete, Sydney is now a successful food blogger who still holds a flame for her college boyfriend whom she hasn’t seen in ten years… until now.

programme.title: Hint of Love
programme.desc: Hint of Love : A cookbook literary agent with culinary training is tasked with helping elevate the brand of a food channel personality known for his convenience-oriented recipes.

programme.title: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Marrying Mr. Darcy : Elizabeth, a down to earth school teacher and Donovan, a reserved New York businessman, are very different. Which means their engagement and wedding is nothing if unpredictable.

programme.title: Amazing Winter Romance
programme.desc: Amazing Winter Romance : When journalist Julia goes back home to find inspiration, she discovers her childhood friend has built a giant snow maze which prompts her to find her way to true love.

programme.title: Love on the Slopes
programme.desc: Love on the Slopes : NYC-based copy editor, Alex, is sent to Ridgeline Resort, an extreme sports outpost, to write a story for a travel writing competition.

programme.title: Love in the Zion National: A National Park Romance
programme.desc: Love in the Zion National: A National Park Romance : Assistant curator, Lauren, is out to prove a set of ancient vases belong with the Pueblo Nation. While in Zion she meets Adam, a native Puebloan park ranger, who helps her on her mission.

programme.title: Love is a Piece of Cake
programme.desc: Love is a Piece of Cake : Jessie Dale is a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery.

programme.title: The Tree That Saved Christmas
programme.desc: The Tree That Saved Christmas : Molly Logan needs a miracle to save her parents' Christmas tree farm from foreclosure. The answer may lie in the sapling Molly rescued as a child.

programme.title: A Magical Christmas Village
programme.desc: A Magical Christmas Village : Follows Summer's life as her mother Vivian and daughter Chloe move in with her. Vivian sets up a miniature Christmas village. As Chloe begins setting up the figurines, real-life events seem to mimic the scenes.

programme.title: Glenbrooke Christmas
programme.desc: Glenbrooke Christmas : Longing to be accepted for herself and not just her wealth, an heiress heads to the small town of Glenbrooke, where she discovers the joys of a simple Christmas, community, and maybe even love.

programme.title: Well Suited for Christmas
programme.desc: Well Suited for Christmas : Rachel Rocca is a fashion designer who must dress the city's most eligible bachelor Brett Stone, for a Christmas charity gala. As she works on it, she finds out the actual reason behind his charity...

programme.title: Time For Him to Come Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Time For Him to Come Home for Christmas : Four days before Christmas, Elizabeth receives a voicemail from a number she doesn't recognize. On the message, a man she doesn't know makes one final plea to the love of his life.

programme.title: A Fabled Holiday
programme.desc: A Fabled Holiday : Talia and her childhood best friend Anderson unexpectedly reunite in a familiar looking town full of Christmas spirit that restores its visitors during their times of deep turmoil.

programme.title: Christmas Miracle
programme.desc: Christmas Miracle : Ever-optimistic single mom Emma Sanderson is looking for a Christmas miracle to write about for the lifestyle magazine at which she has landed a temporary job. While following her lead on the story...

programme.title: Our Italian Christmas Memories
programme.desc: Our Italian Christmas Memories : The Colucci siblings, in an effort to jog the memory of their grandfather who is struggling with dementia, set out to recreate their late grandmother’s legendary pasta sauce.

programme.title: Christmas Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: Christmas Scavenger Hunt : When Belinda heads back to her hometown for the holidays, things get complicated when she is forced to team up with her ex, Dustin, at the town's annual Christmas scavenger hunt.

programme.title: The Jane Mysteries: Inheritance Lost
programme.desc: The Jane Mysteries: Inheritance Lost : Singer Jane DaSilva inherits the family foundation which is a non-profit detective agency that helps people who aren’t able to help themselves.

programme.title: College Dating App
programme.desc: College Dating App : Trina goes live with her unique dating website and it becomes a huge success until she shuts it down to stop a prostitution hub. When one of the users from the site turns up dead, Trina looks to her now-defunct site...

programme.title: Ann Rules Circle of Deception
programme.desc: Ann Rules Circle of Deception : A small, island community is turned upside down when Russel Douglas, a local businessman, is found dead the day after Christmas.

programme.title: Maid for Revenge
programme.desc: Maid for Revenge : When a struggling young maid wakes up next to her client's pool covered in blood, she discovers the owner dead in the water and her eight-year-old son's life is in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Dancing Detective: A Deadly Tango
programme.desc: The Dancing Detective: A Deadly Tango : Constance Bailey is a no-nonsense detective who prefers to work alone. When a high-profile CEO is murdered on the eve of his company’s corporate event in Malta Detective Bailey is sent undercover.

programme.title: Is There A Killer In My Family?
programme.desc: Is There A Killer In My Family? : True-crime author, Carly, and her husband Kevin take a vacation at a historical mansion on Crawford Island. Kevin thinks it will be a chance for them to reconnect, but Carly plans to research an unsolved murder.

programme.title: My Moms Darkest Secrets
programme.desc: My Moms Darkest Secrets : Soon after meeting her long-lost biological mother, Ashley finds herself caught in a web of lies and deceit in which she isn't sure if her mother is innocent or guilty of a murder.

programme.title: Bad Influence
programme.desc: Bad Influence : A single mom is overjoyed when her daughter finally makes friends at her new high school. Soon, however, it becomes clear that this group of students follows their own moral code that's strange, self-centered, and possibly dangerous.

programme.title: Canadian Pickers
programme.desc: Hey Big Spender : The guys are in British Columbia where they're ready to blow a big wad of cash on a few West Coast treasures.

programme.title: Canadian Pickers
programme.desc: Grumps & Grinders : There’s fertile picking in the Fraser Valley when the guys stop in to scour a hangar-sized collection of Canadiana. Aka ‘Grumpy and Granny’, John and Marion prove they love to haggle.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Scorched Earth : Mike and Avery recover a valuable abandoned Volkswagen, and threats from the authorities force Mike to make a surprising decision about the future of his Field of Dreams.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Hot Diggity Dog : Avery gambles on finishing a build from his past and the authorities crack down on his vehicle-filled property, while Mike finishes his ’55 LaFrance Fire Truck.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: The Naked Truth : Mike restores an ultra-rare 1971 Super Bee, and with the sale of his Field of Dreams looming, struggles to sell cars, and hunts for a new place to live.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Some Assembly Required : Vandalism strikes the Wildman shop, inspiring Avery to finish building his Manta Coyote kit car. Mike hires a secret labourer to help with his ’71 Super Bee, and plans an auction of his car collection.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Four Cars and A Wedding : As the clock ticks towards his auction, Mike races to restore as many cars as he can. At Wildman, Avery struggles to finish the Manta in time for it to be painted, and Connor ties the knot in Rust Valley’s biggest event of the year.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Fuel to the Fire : Forest fires threaten Rust Valley and after his neighbour loses 350 cars, Mike hoards fuel in case he needs to save his own collection. Cassidy leads the charge on a unique project for charity, and James takes on an impossible job.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Nobody's Perfect : New painter Neil takes a perfectionist approach to re-painting Connor’s ’66 Chevelle Malibu, Mike worries that his car collection won’t sell for much at auction, and Dubs Kustoms scores a new client with an impossible dream.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Crushing It : Mike struggles to pick just ten cars to keep out of his massive collection, and helps build an ultra-rare Volkswagen truck. Shafin convinces Avery to clean up his yard with the help of a monster truck.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: The Family Circus : Mike builds a big wagon for a big family – a 1964 Parisienne – just as last-minute chaos in the final days of auction preparation throw the event into jeopardy. Avery scores his first client of the year, building a 1975 Ford Bronco.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: No Reserve : A major setback in the final stages of restoring a 1964 Parisienne blows Mike’s budget. The day of Mike’s auction – and the biggest financial gamble of his life – arrives. Mike grapples with regret and chaos threatens to derail the entire event.

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Designed By Drew, Model Hunter McGrady, Former NFL Star Tiki Barber : Drew surprises a very deserving 22-year-old and her family with a living room makeover in Designed By Drew. Model Hunter McGrady on being a role model for body positivity. Former NY Giants star Tiki Barber co-pilots a special Drew’s News sports edition.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jenny McCarthy, Lovebug: Grandma Dating App Edition, Drew-Gooder, Terence J : “The Masked Singer's” Jenny McCarthy chats. Grandma Joy picks a date for her granddaughter using a dating app. Meet Latrice McArthur, founder of the Wellness with Bella focused on healthy eating and meals for those in need. Terence J joins Drew’s News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Lilly Singh, Butcher Loreal Gavin, Sean Evans : “A Little Late with Lilly Singh” host Lilly Singh stops by to chat. “Hot Ones” host Sean Evans joins Drew and Ross in Drew’s News. Butcher and author of “The Butcher Babe Cookbook” Loreal Gavin shares her special marinade revealing her secret ingredient.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Game Show Week! Dakota Johnson, Design By Drew: 4 Items Under $40 : Dakota Johnson joins Drew to chat and play a game of show-rades with an essential worker nurse. Meet The Yummy Brothers, four brothers under the age of 12 on a mission to turn their family cookie recipe into a booming business. Plus, a Design By Drew.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Henry Winkler, Nico Santos, Drew Gooder, Cooking with Chef Aaron Sanchez : Henry Winkler on his latest children’s book, "Lights, Camera, Danger!" "Superstore" star Nico Santos joins Drew. Drew shines a spotlight on 18-year-old hero Justin Galvin." Plus, Drew celebrates Hispanic Heritage Month cooking with Aaron Sanchez.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon, Cake Week Kick-Of with Molly Yeh, Norah O’Donnell : Jimmy Fallon stops by to chat about his new book and plays a rousing game of "Drewth or Dare." Drew kicks-off Cake Week with Molly Yeh, who is whipping up a chocolate chili splatter paint cake. Plus, CBS Evening News Anchor Norah O’Donnell joins Drew.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Marcus Samuelsson, Andie MacDowell, Jameela Jamil, Battle of the Bites: BBQ : Award-winning chef and author Marcus Samuelsson whips up Big Ole’ Pork Chops. Jameela Jamil stops by to chat. Then, a Battle of the Bites: BBQ Ribs edition with Drew and Ross. Plus, “No Man’s Land” star Andie MacDowell joins Drew’s News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Sharon Stone, Chef Carla Hall, Beauty Routines with Allure Magazine’s Editor In Chief : "Ratched" star Sharon Stone joins Drew. Plus, "Halloween Baking Championship" Host and Judge Carla Hall shares one of her favorite foods with Drew. Drew discusses her morning and evening routine with Allure Magazine’s Editor in Chief Michelle Lee.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jason Biggs, Rita Ora, Dear Drew : "Cherries Wild" Host Jason Biggs stops by. Jason’s wife Jenny Mollen shares how to make an epic boxed lunch for your kids. Then, International pop sensation Rita Ora helps Drew whip up a cocktail in advance of National Margarita Day. Plus, a "Dear Drew."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Milo Ventimiglia, Amy Sedaris, "Kids Book Club" with Jonah Featuring Cat Deeley, Wildflower : Milo Ventimiglia stops by. Amy Sedaris joins Drew for DIY crafting fun. Cat Deeley discusses her new book. Drew spotlights women who have paved their own way to success including a veteran who started an arts program for fellow veterans.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Joel McHale, Drew In Your Business, Steven Bartlett : Joel McHale stops by to chat. Drew helps entrepreneur Stephanie Davison take her business to the next level. Drew and Ross Mathews are joined by the founder of the disruptive global marketing agency The Social Chain Steven Bartlett in Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Halloween Celebration with Adam Sandler, Pumpkin Blaze, Jill Kargman : Drew kicks-off her week-long Halloween celebration with Netflix’s “Hubie Halloween” star Adam Sandler. Then, actress Jill Kargman and Drew visit Pumpkin Blaze Long Island! Plus, Drew tackles dating at any age in her signature “Love Bug” segment.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew Carey, David Boreanz, Drew-Over: Game Show Fails, Deborah Norville : Drew continues game show week with Drew Carey. "Seal Team" star David Boreanz chats. programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Oil Wells : The Mertzes get a pair of new tenants. Sam and Nancy Johnson are from Texas and reportedly have inside knowledge on a certain oil stock that is about to shoot through the roof. Lucy and Ethel are excited by the prospect, but Fred and Ricky have doubts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Loses His Temper : How long can Ricky Ricardo go, without losing his temper? When Lucy buys a new hat for $49.50, Ricky goes ballistic. To make a point, Lucy bets Ricky the cost of the hat that he'll lose his temper long before her next purchase.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Home Movies : Hurt that no one seems to care for his home movies, Ricky declares that he will never show them another feature of his...not even the TV pilot he's creating. Jealous of his project, Lucy enables the help of the Mertzes and creates her own musical western.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Bonus Bucks : Ricky scoffs at his wife and Ethel when they adamantly participate in the hunt for the "Bonus Buck" that will win them prize money from a newspaper contest. Later, Ricky discovers one of the lucky bucks in his own wallet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky's Hawaiian Vacation : Lucy desperately wants to accompany her husband on his concert tour of Hawaii, but Ricky can't afford to bring her along. Unsatisfied, Lucy decides she'll win a trip for herself and neighbors, The Mertzes, by entering a television game show contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Is Envious : In an attempt to compete with her wealthy friends, Lucy pledges $500 (that she doesn't have) to charity. Luckily, Ethel spots an ad in Billboard magazine willing to pay $500 to anyone willing to perform a stunt to publicize a new movie, Women From Mars.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Writes A Novel : Lucy wants to be a published author after hearing about another housewife who made a fortune doing it. Ricky and the Mertzes don't like it when they discover Lucy's book plays too close a resemblance to real life including anecdotes from their own lives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's Club Dance : Lucy organizes an orchestra among her girl friends, but it plays so horribly that she asks her bandleader husband, Ricky, to come to a rehearsal and give them some advice. His direction does little to help.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Diner : Ricky becomes interested in a diner that is for sale so the Ricardos and the Mertzes all buy it together. Right away, Ethel and Fred feel they are doing all the work while Lucy and Ricky have all the fun.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Black Wig : Lucy decides to try a new look, despite her husband Ricky's objections. She borrows a black wig from her hairdresser Roberta, who tells Lucy it makes her look like a whole different person. With that in mind, Lucy decides to play a little trick on Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Tennessee Ernie Visits : Lucy's mother writes to ask if she and her husband "Xavier" would be so kind as to entertain "a friend's roommate's cousin's middle boy, Ernest" when he visits New York.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Tennessee Ernie Hangs On : Lucy and Ricky, tired of the extensive visit by their cousin Tennessee Ernie, try to get rid of the likeable character by pleading poverty. Ernie then tries to help his gracious hosts out of their fiscal desperation.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Golf Game : Golf pro Jimmy Demaret visits Lucy and Ethel on the green to show them how the game is really played after they're misled by Ricky and Fred. Lucy and Ethel decide they'll learn how to play golf to spend more time with their husbands.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Sublease : Ricky books a two-month summer job in Maine and decides to take Lucy and Little Ricky. For the summer, they want to sublet their apartment at a profit, but their friends and landlords, the Mertzes, are not in favor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Cries Wolf : Lucy feigns a crisis to test Ricky's love after hearing a story about a woman whose husband ignored her pleas for help while being robbed—she assumes Ricky would turn his back on her too.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Matchmaker : Lucy plays Cupid and tries to bag a bachelor for a husband-hungry girlfriend. Lucy organizes an evening to show her unmarried friends, Dorothy and Sam, how wonderful marriage is.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Business Manager : Ricky Ricardo hires business manager Mr. Hickox to solve the family budget problems. Lucy, dissatisfied with her new $5 per month allowance, manages to find a loophole in the business manager's system.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Mr. and Mrs. TV Show : Ricky agrees reluctantly to host a new television show, sponsored by Phipps Department Store, and learns they'd like him to host with his wife Lucy. When Lucy finds out that Ricky didn't want her in the show, she sets out to sabotage the program.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Mertz and Kurtz : Lucy agrees to help her neighbor Fred Mertz impress an old vaudeville buddy who's in town for a visit. Lucy poses as the Mertzes maid "Bessie" to make Barney Kurtz believe Fred hit it big in real estate.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky's Movie Offer : Lucy mistakes Ben Benjamin, a Hollywood talent scout, for a burglar and nearly ruins Ricky's chance for a film career. When Benjamin arrives at the Ricardos' apartment to meet with Ricky, Lucy and Ethel smash a vase over his head!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky's Screen Test : Lucy travels with Ricky to Hollywood for his big screen test and gets excited about the possibility of living there. According to industry insiders Ricky is a shooin for the lead role in "Don Juan".

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's Mother-In-Law : Lucy Ricardo meets her Spanish-speaking mother-in-law for the first time and her efforts to be a gracious host turn disastrous. Lucy's inability to speak Spanish and her in-law's inability to understand Lucy's pantomime erects a wall of misunderstanding.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel's Birthday : Despite the reservations of her husband, Lucy decides to help Fred pick out a birthday present for Ethel. She picks out a pair of toreador pants, which Ethel thinks are unflattering as well as too big.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky's Contract : Ricky Ricardo paces the floor, awaiting word from Hollywood about his screen test. Lucy can't use the phone for fear the line will be busy when Ben Benjamin tries to call for Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Getting Ready : A movie contract for Ricky necessitates a change in scenery and the hanging of a "for rent" sign on the Ricardos' New York home. The Mertzes, willing to give up tenants but not friends, sign on for the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's Club Dance : Lucy organizes an orchestra among her girl friends, but it plays so horribly that she asks her bandleader husband, Ricky, to come to a rehearsal and give them some advice. His direction does little to help.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Diner : Ricky becomes interested in a diner that is for sale so the Ricardos and the Mertzes all buy it together. Right away, Ethel and Fred feel they are doing all the work while Lucy and Ricky have all the fun.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Billionaire (Part 1) : Matlock discovers he has more than enough suspects to go around for a murder which has the wrong man is in jail.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Billionaire (Part 2) : Matlock discovers he has more than enough suspects to go around for a murder which has the wrong man in jail.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Blind Justice : Matlock must break a seemingly perfect defense when Arthur Hampton, a blind sculptor, shoots the man responsible for his loss of sight. After waiting many years, Hampton finally takes his revenge on Clay Graham, the playboy responsible for his blindness.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Annihilator : Matlock treads on unfamiliar turf when he spearheads an investigation to defend a popular wrestler, known as The Annihilator when he is accused of killing Sailor Jack, his nemesis in the ring.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Husband : Matlock’s professional curiosity can’t help but get him involved in Michelle’s defense of Diane Benson, one of three women who were married to the same murdered man.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Power Brokers (Part 2) : Matlock finds himself in a legal dilemma: his client stuns the courtroom with a confession, and then, saying that government agents had persuaded her to do so, tries to recant it.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Network : Matlock defends Paul J. Bartel, a top TV producer accused of murdering the programming chief at the top-rated network, and finds the case has more twists than most Hollywood scripts.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Best Friend : When a renowned author is murdered, Matlock defends the accused – the subject of a biography the victim was writing – only to encounter a disturbing revelation about his client midway through the trial.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Primal : Scourge and Optimus Prime battle each other for the Jungle Planet Cyber Key with Override from Speed Planet and Lori from earth being the guest viewers.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Trust : In an attempt to confuse the Decepticons, Optimus makes duplicate cyber keys for each Autobot. Meanwhile Dr. Suzuki makes an amazing discovery at the North Pole.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Trap : The secret history of Earth and Cybertron is revealed with the awakening of monster-hunting Autobot Smokescreen/Crosswise. Meanwhile the Autobots are drawn into a cavern filled with ancient Decepticons...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Invasion : Starscream unleashes the ancient Decepticons in an attempt to find Earth's Cyber Planet Key, Optimus leads the Autobots in battle...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Retreat : The Minicons rescue the kids from the military, while Sideways learns the location of the Autobots' Earth base and leads every Decepticon to Coby's home town...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Revelation : Scourge frees Megatron from Starscream's trap and heads toward Earth. The Autobots must deal with Megatron and locating Starscream's location at the same time.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Critical : Just as all hope is lost, the light of Primus shines down on the fallen Autobot warriors (Scattershot, Red Alert, and Hot Shot) and resurrects them.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Assault : A three-way battle unfolds between the Decepticons, the Autobots, and Starscream's forces. Then, an Autobot warrior named Wing Saber appears.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Starscream : With the Autobots closing in, Starscream unleashes the Omega Lock's power and grows to a tremendous size.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: United : Override, Evac, and Leobreaker are sent to help the Cybertron Defense team on Cybertron. Megatron's Decepticons follow as well as Thunderblast who joins Megatron. Optimus and Wing Saber combine and overpower Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Cybertron : The Autobots are finally able to destroy Megatron. They then try to revive Cybertron using the Omega Lock, but it triggers a reaction that seemingly begins to tear apart the planet!

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Balance : The true form of planet Cybertron is revealed as the planet sized transformer, Primus. Jolt is used as the device to connect and relay the messages of Primus, who begins to speak of things that have long since passed.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Darkness : The Autobots search for Jolt and the kids who have been kidnapped by Sideways and Starscream, but Megatron has discovered new information regarding Unicron's dark power that could alter the effects of the war.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Memory : The kids are forced to use trickery to keep Sideways and Starscream from deleting Jolt's memory, but the Autobots are getting closer with every minute.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Escape : Jolt and the kids manage to get off a distress call, but Megatron refuses to let Optimus out of battle forcing Vector Prime to lead the rescue team with one big question: will they arrive on time?

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Family : In order to rescue his brother, Coby decides to go to Giant Planet. But before he leaves, he tries to tell his parents about the Transformers.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Titans : Primus tries to use his spark energy to stop the black hole but Starscream interferes by throwing himself into Primus's spark energy, this causes him to grow to planet size. He then decides to take on Primus.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Warp : The Autobots travel to the Giant Planet on the old Atlantian ship Ogygia, but in the space bridge they must face off with the very mind of Atlantis itself.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Giant : The Autobots must convince giant Transformers who are only interested in building new buildings to assist them in their search for the Cyber Planet Key.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Fury : The Autobots begin the search for the missing Cyber Planet Key, but there about to have bigger problems on hand as Megatron is resurrected into the mighty Galvatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: City : Optimus and company rescue Bud and the Minicons, but Ransack and Crumplezone will do everything possible to prevent them from finding the Cyber Planet Key.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Ambush : The Autobots divide into teams and journeys to the depths of Giant Planet. However, they face a difficult battle against an attack from a strange underground structure and Decepticon.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Challenge : The black hole expands even further and the crisis has approached Jungle Planet. Leobreaker and Snarl wager the leader's throne and challenge Scourge. Meanwhile Lori discovers an image that depicts the past when Giant Planet was concealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Scourge : Although Scourge is the winner of the fight, Scourge's emotion causes him to hesitate. Among such, he encounters by chance Bud, who has formed the Mini-Con Recon Team. Meanwhile, the Cybertron Defense Team shifts into action and takes on Galvatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Optimus : The Autobots and Decepticons finally reach the lowest depths of Giant Planet. Coby and Landmine head to the spaceship Lemuria where the Planet Key is located.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Showdown : Starscream and Galvatron battle for possession of the Omega Lock and the four Planet Keys. Though the Autobots try to intervene, Soundwave and Sideways get in their way and hope to see the battle through to the end.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Guardian : Wing Saber hurries to the space bridge in the sky. However, he was not there in time and the space bridge begins to fall apart due to the battle that had just occurred. Lori grieves that she cannot return to her home world.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Homecoming : Galvatron uses his might to pull Earth, the Speed Planet, and the Jungle Planet through space bridges forcing all Transformers to unite and fight against him.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: End : Optimus approaches Galvatron to take the Omega Lock and Planet Keys. However, Galvatron is drawing out the power of the Planet Keys, and Thundercracker, Thunderblast, Ransack, and Crumplezone grow to giant size.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Unfinished : Galvatron who is worn out and without power wanders through the universe. At that time, something shining catches his eye. The voice of Starscream is heard and asks "Have You Given Up?".

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Beginning : Representatives of each planet have successively gathered together on Cybertron. The first Space Peace Conference opens with Optimus Prime. Optimus Prime makes a proposal for the construction plan of a new space bridge.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Duke of Oil : Mike falls for a one-of-a-kind vintage motorcycle sign; a man keeps his treasures in a creepy cabin in the woods; Danielle's unique company car drives her crazy.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: American Pickers : Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: American Pickers : Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: American Pickers : Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: American Pickers : Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: My Sweet Ford : Mike and Frank find a classic 1933 Ford that's been sitting so long that a tree has grown around it, but nothing will stop them from rescuing this rare ride.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: High Energy Crisis : Mike and Frank have their hands full with a high-strung collector; Danielle lands in New York City for a high-stakes auction of rock 'n' roll memorabilia.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Love 'Em and Leave 'Em : A former Georgia boxer fights to keep a lifetime of stockpiled stuff; the guys visit a VW graveyard; the guys gain access to Tommy's Fort Knox of junk.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Woody Wood Picker : The guys stumble upon Woody the woodcarver's 80-acre property; the guys get first dibs on an aviation museum's once-in-a-lifetime sale, and their guide turns out to be an American hero.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Texas Treasures : In the heart of oil country, a family's vintage service station resembles a petroliana museum where the inventory is all off-limits.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: For a Few Dollars More : A fast-talking negotiator is determined to get top dollar for every last piece of her collection; a local artist has a killer collection of atomic age lamps and glow-in-the-dark sculptures; a lone mountain home features its own jailhouse.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Pedal Pushers : Outside of Washington, D.C., Mike and Frank find a stash of untouched inventory from one of the country's oldest bicycle and sporting goods store.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Going Down? : If the guys can't get a mammoth 1929 Roadster safely down a decaying 100-year-old elevator, they will be $20,000 in the hole; Mike uncovers a surprise when he hears hissing coming from beneath an out-of-control collection.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Emu Chase : Mike and Frank find themselves in a high-risk situation when they are chased by a crazy emu; Frank Wolfe gives the guys a golden lead; the guys surprise an old friend of Mike's.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Bound for Badness : Mike and Frank make a killer backroom deal after winding up at the home of a former arms dealer and her Judo-champion husband.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: All That Glitters : Inspector Gadget with the help of his niece Penny, stops M.A.D. agents from stealing gold from the ancient City of Gold and uncover a real gold temple

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The Incredible Shrinking Gadget : Dr. Claw hires Dr. Shieskopf to invent a shrinking ray gun to shrink Inspector Gadget down to the size of a mouse. Quimby orders Gadget to investigate a suspected MAD plot at the Eccentric Invention Convention.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Don'T Hold Your Breath : Chief Quimby and Penny aid Inspector Gadget in rescuing three famous oceanographers who are kidnapped by M.A.D

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Magic Gadget : Dr. Claw schemes with two magicians, the Lesser and the Great Wambini, to steal gold bars from the bank vault. To ensure Inspector Gadget's absence, the Lesser Wambini presents the Inspector with complimentary tickets to the show which he gladly accepts.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby Exchange : Inspector Gadget protects Nick Defecto. M.A.D. is trying to destroy him because of the secret he knows.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Tree Guesses : Dr. Claw has invented a spray that rots wood instantly. If he is not paid one million dollars he will destroy every forest in the world. Inspector Gadget and Penny locate and destroy Dr. Claw's invention.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Meets The Grappler : Gadget is planning a trip on the Oriental Express Mystery Tour Train and is warned by Quimby about a MAD plot to kill him while aboard.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Unhenged : Inspector Gadget's mission is to stop M.A.D. from kidnapping the scientists of the world and holding them for ransom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Win Some, Lose Some : Peppermint Fizz is so determined to win the Nearly Once-A-Yearly Strawberryland Games.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: The Killers - Live at Rock Am Ring
programme.desc: The Killers - Live at Rock Am Ring : The Killers perform at Rock Am Ring, a music festival that takes place annually at the Nürburgring Race Track in Western Germany, with tracks like When You Were Young and The World We Live In.

programme.title: Bruce Springsteen: Live in Hyde Park
programme.desc: Bruce Springsteen: Live in Hyde Park : "London Calling: Live in Hyde Park" is a concert video of Bruce Springsteen & the E Street Band's performance during the Hard Rock Calling music festival in Hyde Park, London on June 28, 2009.

programme.title: Foo Fighters - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: Foo Fighters - Austin City Limits : The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Beyoncé - Sound of Change
programme.desc: Beyoncé - Sound of Change : The Sound Of Change was a benefit concert held at Twickenham Stadium, London, England, as part of the Chime For Change initiative, founded by Beyoncé with the help of actress Salma Hayek and Gucci's creative director, Frida Giannini.

programme.title: Ed Sheeran -- Live in London
programme.desc: Ed Sheeran -- Live in London : Ed Sheeran makes a large venue feel intimate; with his guitar and vocal skills, Sheeran delivers a strong performance in 2014 at the Roundhouse Art Center in London.

programme.title: Maroon 5 -- Live in London 2014
programme.desc: Maroon 5 -- Live in London 2014 : Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this Maroon 5 concert features songs such as "Moves Like Jagger," "Daylight," "This Love" and many more.

programme.title: Sting - Bring On The Night
programme.desc: Sting - Bring On The Night : Documents the preparation and rehearsals for Sting's first solo concert, as well as his supporting band's opinions on their leader and his controversial efforts.

programme.title: English Championship Soccer
programme.desc: Birmingham City vs. West Bromwich Albion : From St. Andrew's @ Knighthead Park in Birmingham, England, United Kingdom.

programme.title: Bundesliga Soccer
programme.desc: Werder Bremen vs. FC Bayern München : Werder Bremen (4-7-10, 19 PTS) hosts Bayern Munich (17-3-1, 54 PTS) at Weserstadion. Forward Harry Kane with 24 goals in 21 matches headlines against Stage who has six goals in 19 matches for Bremen. Bayern won against Bremen 4-0 in September.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: All About D.W./Blockheads : When Emily gets the starring role in the preschool play, D.W. is beside herself with jealousy. She should be Little Red Riding Hood, not Tree #2! Then, D.W. and Emily are upset when they get stuck with the blocks at playtime.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Get Smart/Baby Steps : Everyone loves HUGO--the new interactive whiteboard that claims to be 100% accurate. If only Mr. Ratburn knew how to use it. Mei Lin can say "hello" AND play the piano?!? Kate can't even wave!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Night of the Tibble/Read and Flumberghast : The Tibble Twins are having their first sleepover! Will the Tibbles lock James in the dark basement? Then, a cupcake's been stolen! The primary suspect: Tommy Tibble. D.W. gathers a jury and demands that justice be served.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Last Tough Customer/Brain's Chess Mess : The Tough Customers realize it's time to quit bullying and set out to find a new hobby--but can Molly ever truly change her ways? And Brain starts a chess club at school to improve his game and beat Los Dedos, the local chess master.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Baseball Blues/Brain's Biggest Blunder : It's Grebelings season and George can't wait to play! After all, no one knows more about baseball than George. Then, wBrain gets teamed with Buster and Binky in the annual Arithmattack competition.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Buster's Book Battle/On the Buster Scale : Lakewood Elementary has just instituted IRP; a program where kids can earn points (and prizes!) for reading. Then, Buster and Brain never agree on movies. Buster rates every film a 10+, while Brain doesn't seem to like anything.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Fern and the Case of the Stolen Story/Sue Ellen Vegges Out : Fern has writer's block! Fortunately, Ladonna's full of stories, and Fern decides to "borrow" the tales and simply change the names. Then, when Sue Ellen decides to stop eating meat, Muffy and Francine compete to be the best vegetarian.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: So Funny I Forgot to Laugh/The Best Day Ever : Arthur thinks his jokes about Sue Ellen's new sweater are in good fun but Sue Ellen's feelings are hurt. Has Arthur become a bully? Everyone is reminiscing about their "best days." Except Arthurs. Is it possible he doesn't have one?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Show Off/Dog's Best Friend : It's the Elwood City dog show and Killer is facing off against Sebastian Winkleplotz, the snooty, championship-winning poodle. Arthur agrees to watch Amigo while Alberto's off at camp, but Pal gets worried.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Adventures in Budylon/Ladonna Compson: Party Animal : D.W. and Bud embark on an epic wilderness adventure--the backyard has never been so exciting! Apple picking, bake sales, craft classes…there's so much to do in Elwood City in the fall! And Ladonna's determined to do it all.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Molina's Mulligan/Buster Bombs : Alberto discovers he has a natural talent for golf and begins to compete, but will his dad's embarrassing cheers make him give it up? Buster has lost his flair for funny, and the harder he tries to make people laugh, the worse it gets.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Opposites Distract/Just the Ticket : Arthur and Buster have always been best friends, but when a leaky roof forces Arthur to study in Buster's room, they discover that they make better friends than roommates. Arthur's ecstatic when he wins free concert tickets on the radio.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: All Thumbs/Kidonia : When Arthur catches Buster sucking his thumb, Buster worries that Arthur will tell the entire school. Tired of doing chores, Arthur and friends decide to invent their own country. Will this kid-ruled utopia flourish or descend into anarchy?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Speak Up Francine/Waiting for Snow : The local creek is polluted and pesticide run-off is to blame. Francine is determined to get the word out at the annual Earth Day rally. Ladonna can't wait to experience her first blizzard, if only the weather would cooperate.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Pets and Pests/Go Fly a Kite : There's a mouse loose in the Read home! And D.W. wants it gone…NOW! When traps fail, Arthur enlists the help of an expert mouse catcher. While playing in the park, Binky, Muffy, and Ladonna stumble upon an abandoned kite.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Director's Cut/Crime and Consequences : After meeting his hero, Hollywood director Tufton Sinclair, George is inspired to make a movie of his own. When George accidentally breaks the class's prize woodworking project, Binky gets unfairly blamed.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Caught in the Crosswires/Framed : Muffy is thrilled when mega producer J3 chooses her family for his latest reality TV project. After all, she was born to be star! Buster has just won the best young artist award at the Elwood City Arts Festival.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Binky's Music Madness/Brain Freeze : Everyone loves the Bang on a Can All-Stars, a funky experimental music group that's touring around Elwood City. Everyone that is, except Binky. A new ice cream shop has just opened up across the block. Will Brain's shop be able to survive?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Tattletale Frog/D.W. & Bud's Higher Purpose : When Bud is blamed for an accident D.W. causes, she has to decide whether to let her friend take the fall. D.W. and Bud can't wait to ride a new rollercoaster. Will they make it past the ticket taker, or will they come up short?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Friend Who Wasn't There/Surprise! : Muffy embarks on a quest to find her long lost imaginary friend. And then it's Catherine's 16th birthday, and Francine has been cordially UN-invited to the party.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Case of the Girl with the Long Face/The Substitute Arthur : Fern's been feeling low and no one can figure out why. Luckily, Buster Baxter is on the case! With Arthur out of town, Buster is on the hunt for a new best friend, but he only wants to play games HIS way. Will Buster learn to compromise?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Best Wishes/The Tardy Tumbler : After George has a lucky streak, his friends pressure him to wish for a snow day. Can George deliver? Prunella's excited about making the gymnastics team, until she realizes practice starts at 6am! Will she practice or snooze?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Fountain Abbey/Arthur Calls It : Muffy's devastated when she learns her great, great grandmother Mary Alice wasn't royalty, but a common maid. Pressure from his classmates has Arthur doubting his decision to call Buster out during a baseball game.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Whip. Mix. Blend./Staycation : When Rattles's mom starts dating Archie Vanderloo, Rattles finds himself spending time with his twins, but they don’t have anything in common. Arthur offers to babysit so that his parents can enjoy some peace and quiet in the backyard.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Two Minutes/Messy Dress Mess : Power shifts in the Tibble household when the twins find out Tommy is two minutes older than Timmy. Ladonna's thrilled when Muffy loans her a beautiful recital dress, but a run-in with a painted bench creates a problem.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur Read: Super Saver!/Tibbles to the Rescue! : Business is slow for Mr. and Mrs. Read, and Arthur is concerned. Can he find ways to keep his family in the green? When D.W. saves Tommy and Timmy from a nasty fall, they decide to repay the favor…whether D.W. likes it or not.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Pageant Pickle/Some Assembly Required : School is almost out and Arthur can hardly wait for those lazy summer days by Muffy's pool. Nothing could ruin such a happy time of year, except maybe D.W.'s Spring Pageant! And then D.W. can't wait to test out her new play set!

programme.title: Patriots Day
programme.desc: Patriots Day : In the aftermath of the Boston Marathon bombings, police Sgt. Tommy Saunders, FBI Special Agent Richard DesLauriers and Commissioner Ed Davis join survivors, first responders and other investigators in a race against time to find the suspects.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: Stolen : A former thief (Nicolas Cage) has just 12 hours to come up with $10 million after his former partner (Josh Lucas) kidnaps his daughter and locks her in a cab.

programme.title: A Most Wanted Man
programme.desc: A Most Wanted Man : An escaped militant's (Grigoriy Dobrygin) attempt to claim an inheritance gives a German agent (Philip Seymour Hoffman) the chance to lay a trap for a well-regarded Muslim scholar who is suspected of financing terrorists.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: Safe : A young girl whose memory holds a priceless numerical code, finds herself pursued. Coming to her aid is an ex-cage fighter whose life was destroyed by the gangsters on Mei's trail.

programme.title: Macbeth
programme.desc: Macbeth : After murdering King Duncan (David Thewlis) and seizing the throne, Macbeth (Michael Fassbender) becomes consumed with guilt and paranoia as the tyrannical ruler of Scotland.

programme.title: For Colored Girls
programme.desc: For Colored Girls : A group of women (Kimberly Elise, Janet Jackson, Loretta Devine) comes together in search of commonality and understanding in the wake of personal crises, heartbreak and crimes.

programme.title: I Can Do Bad All by Myself
programme.desc: I Can Do Bad All by Myself : Madea catches teenage Jennifer and her two younger brothers looting her home. She decides to take matters into her own hands and delivers the young delinquents to the only relative they have, their aunt April, who wants nothing to do with the kids.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: The Final Push : Investigators try to find the cause of two similar air crashes that happened nearly 12 years apart.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Turning Point : A Northwest Airlines flight cruises above the Bering Sea before problems develop and pilots must make an emergency landing in Anchorage.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Turning Point : A Northwest Airlines flight cruises above the Bering Sea before problems develop and pilots must make an emergency landing in Anchorage.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Blind Spot : In 1978, PSA Flight 182 collides with a Cessna and crashes into a San Diego residential area killing people on both planes and seven people on the ground.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Under Pressure : On July 11, 1991, the crew of Nigeria Airways Flight 2120 unsuccessfully tries to return to the airport after a burst tire creates an in-flight fire which causes 247 Nigerian pilgrims and 14 crew to perish.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster the Accident Files
programme.desc: Time of War : Mistaken identity and hostile fire over enemy territory are among the many risks that pilots face in war zones around the world.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Edge of Disaster : Atlantic Airways Flight 670 careened off the runway and became engulfed in flames.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Pacific Plunge : When Alaska Airlines Flight 261 suddenly nosedives into the Pacific, investigators uncover a critical maintenance issue with deadly implications.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Deep Freeze : A design flaw sends American Eagle Flight 41-84 smashing into a cornfield outside of Chicago, killing all 68 people on board.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Playing Catch Up : After a private jet slams into an Ohio apartment building, the National Transportation Safety Board uncovers an erratic descent, a puzzling delay, and a tragic perfect storm.

programme.title: The Accident Files
programme.desc: Poor Piloting : A look at accidents caused by errors in the cockpit.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Steep Impact : When the crash of a commuter plane in Georgia kills a NASA astronaut, a four-term U.S. senator and 21 others, the disaster grabs headlines around the world.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: North Sea Nightmare : A turboprop narrowly averts disaster after a lightning strike over the North Sea; investigators uncover an unusual feature in the plane that plays a key role in this calamity.

programme.title: The Accident Files
programme.desc: Dangerous Winds : A look at disasters where strong winds played a role.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Carnage in Sao Paolo : TAM flight 402 slammed into a residential neighborhood and burst into flames, just seconds after lifting off from Congonhas airport in São Paulo, Brazil, killing all 95 people on board and three people on the ground.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Second Guessing : Farrah and Simon seek Dr. Jenn's advice, Amber is nervous about her ritzy new neighborhood, Maci considers postponing the wedding, and Tyler and Nova visit a homesick Catelynn in Arizona.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: So Much to Lose : Amber and Matt decorate their dream home, Catelynn departs treatment in Arizona with new insights, Farrah finally loses patience with Simon, and Maci worries Ryan is neglecting Bentley.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Mother's Day : Gary struggles as Leah spends more time with Amber, Catelynn readjusts to life after treatment, Farrah celebrates her 25th birthday in Miami, and Maci welcomes her newest family member.

programme.title: The Osbournes
programme.desc: Hawaii Five Ozz : Ozzy, Sharon and Jack head to Hawaii for their vacation.

programme.title: The Osbournes
programme.desc: Kelly Interupted : Kelly irritates her mother by getting a lip ring.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Maci : Before she found out she was pregnant, Maci was the classic overachiever from Chattanooga, Tennessee. When her fiancée Ryan takes no interest in helping out with the new baby, Maci has to try to salvage her relationship.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Farrah : Farrah is a popular cheerleader from Council Bluffs, Iowa. When her friends start gossiping about her becoming a single mom, she abandons her high school life and starts spending way too much time with her overbearing mother.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Amber : Amber never imagined she'd spend her senior year moving in with her well meaning, but immature, boyfriend Gary. But with a baby on the way, the two will have to juggle adult responsibilities on a teenage budget.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Second Guessing : Farrah and Simon seek Dr. Jenn's advice, Amber is nervous about her ritzy new neighborhood, Maci considers postponing the wedding, and Tyler and Nova visit a homesick Catelynn in Arizona.

programme.title: Teen Mom

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Mother's Day : Gary struggles as Leah spends more time with Amber, Catelynn readjusts to life after treatment, Farrah celebrates her 25th birthday in Miami, and Maci welcomes her newest family member.

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Give It Another Go! : Sam realises he has to sit down with Chloe so they leave the house for an honest chat. They decide to give things another go but the news doesn't go down well with the rest of the house! (S20, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Tensions Keep Rising : Chloe confronts the girls about not supporting her. Sam's behaviour on a lads night out leads to them splitting up, again! Abbie tells James she saw Chloe get with a lad in Ibiza. (S20, ep3)

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: A Change of Plans : Lauren deals with the fallout of Heidi crashing the Teen Vogue party. When Heidi lands an interview for a 'dream job' that leads her to consider ditching school, permanently, Lauren realizes that she and Heidi may be on different paths.

programme.title: The Hills

programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling enjoy some "White Whines", attend an "Animals Anonymous" meeting and take a trip to the most dangerous suburb in the country "Slamburbia."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Baddie Winkle : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling are joined by the coolest granny in the game, Baddie Winkle, who teaches us how to stay young in "Fountain of Baddie,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXIII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling see the secret skills it takes to be an "Undercover Badass," find a new way of "Gettin' Paid" and learn that some things are simply "Unforgivable."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: DeMarcus Ware & Von Miller : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Super Bowl 50 Champs DeMarcus Ware and Von Miller join Rob and the crew to try out for the "Swat Team," round up some "Attack Chickens," and file to the IRS to become "Fart Tax Exempt."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXIV : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling take the "Running Man Challenge," explore the fear known as "Crap-nophobia" and learn what it means to be "Saved To Death."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Wanda Sykes : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedy icon Wanda Sykes joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to have "Unpresidential Nipples," doling out "Momforcement," and the first-ever "Wandamania."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXV : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel pay homage to some "Legendary Assists," bust up some public makeouts with "PDA Police," and find out why babies are nothing more than "Tiny People, Tiny Brains."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Dillon Francis : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel hang out with artist/producer Dillon Francis to talk some "Wack Smack," learn how to party correctly in "They Did It Right"

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Dave England : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass' Dave England shows Rob, Chanel, and Sterling what it takes to inspire a generation of "Poo Pros," gets careless with some "Bad Daddies" and the agony of getting "Butt Hurt."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Bryan Callen & Brendan Schaub : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, the hosts of The Fighter and The Kid podcast, Bryan Callen and Brendan Schaub, join Rob, Chanel, and Sterling to talk about other "Fighters and Funny People,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXVI : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling look for some "Everyday Peens", watch some videos get "Dog Bombed" and check out some people who have serious "Motor Skills".

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jerry Springer : Tonight on an all-new Ridiculousness, the legendary television host Jerry Springer joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to chant "Jerry! Jerry! Jerry!", watch some "Beastdowns" and post some photos on "Injurgram."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXVII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob shows Chanel and Sterling the animal mastery of "Beast Lords," the tragedy of having a "Craptastrophe" and the dangers of flying "Foot Bombs."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jolene Van Vugt : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, stunt person and Nitro Circus star Jolene Van Vugt stops by to get destructive with "Smash Happy," capture the perfect monkey moments in "Right Place, Right Monkey,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXVIII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling discuss the drunk ingenuity of "Drinkovators", explore the bizarre "Planet Of The Vapes" and test their palates for destruction in the "Taste Of Death".

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXIX : On the Season 9 Premiere of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo get CROPPED OUT, take a trip to their local HELL MART and enjoy some delicious PUMPKIN SPICE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jamie Bestwick : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by BMX legend Jamie Bestwick to experience some serious VERT HURT, keep kids in their place with YOUTH SLAYERS and get over-caffeinated with ROTHROCKED.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XL : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate a RUSSIAN THANKSGIVING, feel the wrath of some TEENY MEANIES and plug in with VIRTUAL RETIREMENT.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Clinton Sparks : Music producer Clinton Sparks teaches Rob, Chanel, and Steelo how to make budget beats with SPARKS OF GENIUS, get cultured with some MASSHOLES, and cause some serious mom damage with MAMA TRAUMA.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XLI : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo attend a RUSSIAN TALENT SHOW, check out some nasty KID MARKS, and discover that THE WORLD'S YOUR WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Danger Ehren : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass legend Danger Ehren teaches Rob, Steelo and Chanel the pain of GETTING DONKEY'D, how to avoid DENTAL DANGER and get adorable with some WHISKEY PETS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XLII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo learn a new game called TRAFFIC TAG, receive some DICK TIPS and things get messy when they POP THE MAN-PAGNE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Steve Wilkos : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, talkshow host Steve Wilkos joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to check out some SURPRISE TITTIES, call STEVECURITY and watch the HIGHEST RATED CATEGORY EVER.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XLIII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo enter the SNACK ZONE, learn the dangers of hiring BUDGET BABYSITTERS and root on reckless golf cart drivers in COUNTRY CLUB DRIFT.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Michael Crossland : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, motivational speaker Michael Crossland joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to teach us the CROSSLAND METHOD, show us what it means when your dog is CROSS-BRED, and visit the FIELD OF NIGHTMARES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Teyana Taylor : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Teyana Taylor joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to pay tribute to KID NAPPERS, and tell us about BIRTHDAY ASSASSINS, and what it's like to be in a LUST BUBBLE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XLIV : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo dive head first into some DEAD POOLS, go into CARROT SHOCK and learn a valuable life lesson that EVERYTHING FARTS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chain Smokers : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy Award-winning duo The Chainsmokers join Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to cringe at some BITERS, ride STOLEN MATTRESSES and marvel at the magic of real-life TELEPORTERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XLV : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo check out the fierce LAWN WARRIORS, learn some wisdom in SPEAK YOUR MIND and witness some FURRY FURY.

programme.title: Today's Top Stories
programme.desc: Today's Top Stories : News stories that matter to Canadians with the context they need to understand Canada and the world.

programme.title: Marketplace
programme.desc: Sunscreen Secrets : We reveal you may not be getting what the companies are selling when it comes to the SPF number on your sunscreen due to the subjective ways it's tested. Plus, we debunk some common sun myths and share the essential steps to protect your skin.

programme.title: Marketplace
programme.desc: The Maple Makeover: Where is our food really from? : Marketplace exposes some popular foods that might seem Canadian but are actually made in the U.S. We reveal what to look for and how to guarantee what you buy is made here at home with Canadian ingredients.

programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: Last Breath : Designed to protect law enforcement and health-care workers, spit hoods have been linked to deaths; banned in parts of the world, in Canada, they're used countrywide, sometimes even on minors.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Invisible Executioner : Jeremy Wade takes on Africa's wild Zambezi River to unmask an invisible predator that is dragging fisherman to their deaths.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Freshwater Shark : After reports of a bloody attack, Jeremy investigates the myth of the freshwater shark.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Malaysian Lake Monster : Two men mysteriously vanish on a remote lake in Malaysia just hours apart. Amid rumours that a giant fish is on the loose, biologist and monster-hunter Jeremy Wade sets out to track down the possible culprit.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Canadian Horror : Canada's waterlogged wilderness is home to many legends, and Jeremy Wade is particularly interested in the story of a 20-foot-long lake monster that attacks humans. He makes it his mission to track down this shadowy predator.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Bone Crusher : Wade faces one of his greatest fears to uncover increasing missing persons cases.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Hidden Predator : Jeremy Wade visits a South African river where the biggest-ever bull shark was found. Is the presence of this man-eater a tragedy waiting to happen?

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Killer Catfish : Searching for the goonch, a potentially huge, man-eating species of catfish found in the foothills of the Himalayas.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Lair of Giants : Jeremy Wade explores the Essequibo, Guyana's largest river. Armed with only old journals and his rod, Jeremy is on a mission to discover if monsters of the past still exist.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Lair of Giants : Jeremy continues his exploration of South Africa's rivers and lakes, tackling an 11-foot black caiman and sitting alongside a 17-foot anaconda.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Best of Series 1-5 : Jeremy Wade's voyages have taken him across the globe to waterways far and wide on an endless search for man-eating creatures that lurk beneath.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Best of Series 1-5 : Jeremy Wade's voyages have taken him across the globe to waterways far and wide on an endless search for man-eating creatures that lurk beneath.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Killer Torpedo : Jeremy travels to Central America to locate a man-sized beast that reportedly leaps into boats and inflicts devastating injuries upon fishermen.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Best of Series 1-5 : Jeremy Wade's voyages have taken him across the globe to waterways far and wide on an endless search for man-eating creatures that lurk beneath.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Vampires of the Deep : Extreme angler Jeremy embarks on a punishing mission to the Pacific Northwest to find an ancient river monster said to rise from the depths to attack swimmers.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Amazon Titanic : Supreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to South America to hunt for a seriously gargantuan fish found in the dark depths of the Amazon River.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Perfect like Roy : Jenn learns that Roy Garber's "perfect, just like me" was more than a catch-phrase when she's tasked with transporting a load that was once shipped by the legend...

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Hernias and Hissy Fits : Marc is weighed down by a load that might just be more than the Snortin' Boar can tackle. Meanwhile, Dusty gets stuck hauling some very unique art.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Punk-Drunk Love : Jessica signs up to move a half-ton steampunk robot in a single day, but will bad weather turn her load into steamjunk? Todd and Tamera realize that moonshine stills and porcelain plates don't mix well in the back of a trailer.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Do No Bodily Harm : A shipment of medical equipment takes a turn for the weird when Jenn learns her load is a LOT different than expected.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Hummers and Bummers : Jarrett, single-handedly almost ruins the west coast art scene when he hauls an odd sculpture to its various photo shoot locations in the Bay area.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Love is a Crazy Carnival Ride : Jessica finds herself asking a LOT of questions after she agrees to transport a seller's loved one named Bruce.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Monsters, Mannequins, and Mayhem : Todd and Tamera take on some Monsters in a move that proves to be anything but cinematic.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: To The Moon and Back : A giant dog toy has Todd and Tamera chasing their tails as they try to navigate trailer issues and engine trouble.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Problems Set in Stone : Marc takes on an antique camper and Dusty transports a sculpture.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Big Wine & Bigger Pine : A giant, but simple chair provides some oversized complications for Jarrett when it won't fit down the stairs.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 1 : In this third season, a group of men and a group of women are abandoned on the opposite side of the same island. Neither knows the other is there. Will these two small groups survive - and what will happen when they meet?

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 2 : The women catch sight of a man in the distance, and when they go to investigate the two groups finally meet. But as a vicious tropical storm rolls in, the thunder and lightning have a devastating effect on amputee and war veteran Hannah.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 3 : Marooned for ten days, the islanders now face starvation. They battle dangerous ocean currents to set fishing nets. Rob develops a tooth abscess, and endures primitive surgery on the beach. And flickers of romance begin.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 4 : Tempers reach fever pitch when Tilly turns on Erika. Dan leads an expedition for food around the rocky coastline. With the tide coming in he must make a difficult decision: do they turn back or risk their lives crossing one last perilous set of rocks?

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 5 : After Patrick's fall, the rest of the group face a terrifying ordeal trying to escape the oncoming sea. Back in camp, the men have been dominating hunting so far - but Tilly decides to venture into the jungle in search of prey.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 6 : The Islanders are barely managing to survive and some of the men’s bodies are starting to fail them. The women continue to look for food and Simon leads a hunt into the jungle for the most dangerous predator on the island: the caiman crocodile.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 7 - Surviving the Island : In this special episode of The Island with Bear Grylls, Bear takes an in-depth look at how the castaways survived.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 1 : Bear Grylls is abandoning 13 ordinary British men on a remote, uninhabited island in the pacific. Can they survive for a month completely alone? When stripped of all the luxuries and conveniences, does a modern man still have skills to survive?

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 2 : In this episode, 48 hours since their last meal and hunger grips the group as the harsh reality of island life is dawning. The race is on to bring food back to camp before they become too weak to hunt.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 3 : The men are radically losing weight, existing on a paltry average of just 300 calories a day. With their very survival hanging in the balance, the castaways lose patience with those they feel are not pulling their weight.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: More Ice : Ice traps a treasure of energy on the ocean floor and confounds scientists still trying to solve why it's so slippery.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Halloween Tech : The celebration of Halloween has become a $6 billion economic powerhouse; the annual Halloween Haunt at Knott's Berry Farm; the production of monster makeup, masks and costumes; carving pumpkins; making fake blood; haunted house.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Christmas Tech : Christmas observance by world's population incorporates trees, ornaments, lights, and treats made cheaper and safer through technology; explore Rockefeller Center preparations, Macy's holiday windows, UNICEF snowflake installation, and more.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: '60s Tech : Color TV; satellite broadcasting; transistor radios; the Ford Mustang.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: '80s Tech : The 1980s transitioned from Industrial to Information Age with brick cell phones, Pac-Man, Rubik's Cube, Sony Walkman, and CDs; microchips revolutionized work, play, and communication through Silicon Valley innovations including Apple computers.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Power Tools : Adam Richman visits power tool manufacturing mecca Dewalt, where he discovers how they're using cutting-edge technology to make cutting-edge tools.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: '90s Tech : Technologies of the 1990s: the information superhighway; DVDs; TiVo; GPS; Google; Amazon distribution center; virtual pets; George Foreman's grill.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: BBQ Tech : Barbecue evolved from old-fashioned cooking into modern multi-billion dollar industry; explore famous cook-offs, established restaurants like Arthur Bryant's Kansas City, post-WWII backyard phenomenon, Weber kettle grills, and spicy sauce varieties.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Bible Tech : Arguably the most influential book ever written, the Bible provides a glimpse into the origins of ancient technology and its use to withstand the elements, build great structures, wage war, and conserve precious water.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Cowboy Tech : Today's cowboys blend Old West traditions with modern technology; examine 19th-century cattle industry boom, Spanish-derived saddles and ropes, barbed wire revolution, and modern computer chips, DNA evidence, and artificial insemination techniques.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Desert Tech : Close to 40% of Earth is classified as desert, but these environments offer hope through Middle East desalination, Las Vegas communities, Hoover Dam power, irrigation agriculture, solar energy, and technology enabling future Mars colonization.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Digi-Tech : DVD, CD, PDA, HDTV, PVR--used to be the ultimate in "gotta have it" gadgets and gizmos and "to die for" technology that populate a digital world of acronyms.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Home Tech : Take a peek into one of today's fully-automated homes that is so smart, the owner can operate everything from the home theater to the outdoor waterfall at a push of one button.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Winter Tech : The technology behind the Vancouver 2010 Winter Olympic Games, including the bobsled run, ski jump and speedskating.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Mummy Tech : Egyptian mummies speak from graves through state-of-the-art CT-scanning technology; explore 2,000-year-old child mummy, 70-day mummification process, King Tut's mysterious death investigation, and nitrogen-filled conservation cases preventing decay.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Pirate Tech : Pirates terrorized high seas since before recorded history; at their 1700s power height, they influenced nations through England-Spain rivalry while bringing maritime technology innovations including modified ships for speed and power enhancement.
