programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Birthday Bashed/Momnipresent : Birthday bashed/Momnipresent: Timmy is excited for his birthday until he realizes that one year older means one year closer to losing his fairies. He spends the entire day trying to thwart all party plans, leading his Mom and Dad to think he's gone crazy!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Wishology: The Big Beginning Pt1 : Timmy goes on an adventure to search for his fairies and a magical wand that will defeat the Darkness.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Wishology: The Big Beginning Pt2 : Timmy goes on an adventure to search for his fairies and a magical wand that will defeat the Darkness.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Wishology: The Exciting Middle Part (Part 1) : Timmy learns he merely slowed down The Darkness and now he must seek a second wand to defeat this evil force. Timmy is forced to make amends with his enemies in order to fight for mankind.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Wishology: The Final Ending (Part 1) : Confident and secure, Timmy feels great having won the battle against The Darkness. His world is quickly turned upside down as he learns that he didn’t win, but is now living inside The Darkness!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Anti-Poof : Anti-Poof: For every fairy, there’s an anti-fairy – thus anti-Poof is born – FOOP! It’s up to Poof to stop this anti-fairy from destroying Fairy World and his loved ones.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Add-A-Dad/Squirrely Puffs : Add-A-Dad/Squirrely Puffs: Dad is too busy to spend quality time with Timmy, so he wishes up "a-lot-a-dads" to hang out with. It's a race between the Squirrely Scouts and the Cream Puffs to the top of Mount Doom!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Mice-Capades/Formula For Disaster : Mice-Capades/Formula For Disaster: Poof has been watching too much of a classic, yet violent "cat & mouse" cartoon. He innocently turns Timmy and Vicky into "Cheesy and Sleazy" and all mayhem breaks loose.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Bad Heir Day/Freaks and Greeks : Bad Heir Day/Freaks and Greeks: Crocker wants an heir to his supposed "fortune and fame." Poof coincidentally ends up in his care and Crocker is set for life.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Fly Boy/Temporary Fairy : Fly Boy/Temporary Fairy: Everybody in Dimmsdale is watching the latest horror film, "Fly Boy." But Timmy isn't allowed to, so when he wishes to become a "fly on the wall".

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Crocker Shocker/Super Zero : Crocker Shocker/Super Zero: Crocker is hypnotized into no longer believing in fairies and becomes normal again. Unfortunately, Fairy World can no longer feed off his spastic energy, and all their magic shuts down.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Dadbracadbra/Timmy Turnip : Dadbracadbra/Timmy Turnip: With a little help from Timmy, Dad’s magic tricks really work. Convinced that Timmy’s dad is a fairy, Crocker is out to prove it and uncover his secret on national television.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: One Man Banned/Frenemy Mine : One Man Banned/Frenemy Mine: After Timmy’s rejected from the school band, he wishes everyone would love his music./Timmy saves Vicky from a horrible accident and suddenly she is stricken by his generosity.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Chicken Poofs/Stupid Cupid : Chicken Poofs/Stupid Cupid: Poof gets the "Chicken Poofs" and turns everyone into actual chickens! Timmy steals Cupid's arrows in an attempt to make Trixie fall in love with him and go to the school "Romance Dance."

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Double Oh Schnozmo/Planet Poof : Double Oh Schnozmo/Planet Poof: Cosmo’s brother, the top secret spy, pays a visit. But when Schnozmo’s revealed to be nothing but a con man, Wanda demands that Schnozmo participate in a real spy adventure in order to spare Cosmo’s feelings.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The Boss of Me/He Poofs, He Scores! : It's "Bring Your Kid to Work Day," and Dad takes Timmy to his office. When Timmy accidentally eats Poof (who is hiding as a marshmallow in Timmy's cereal) Timmy becomes magically talented at soccer.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Play Date...of Doom/Teacher's Pet : Play Date... of Doom/Teacher's Pet: Foop is back! He’s escaped from prison and convinced Cosmo and Wanda he’s ready for a playdate with Poof. But he’s really there to try and destroy his arch enemy again, and it’s up to Timmy and Poof to thwart his plan.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Poltergeeks/Beach Blanket Bozo : When Mom and Dad mistake Cosmo for a ghost and restart their failed ghost-hunting business, Timmy wishes that the fairies would pretend to haunt Dimmsdale.

programme.desc: Old Man and the C-/Balance of Flour : After failing miserably on a game show for 6th graders, Dad admits he dropped out of school in the 5th grade. The next thing Timmy knows, Dad’s in his class!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Farm Pit/Crock Talk : Dad decides to convert the Turner home into a farm. Unfortunately, it takes Cosmo and Wanda’s magic to give Dad a green thumb, and when they’re swept away by a tornado, it’s up to Timmy to save the farm...and his fairies!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: What Price Gloria? - October 16, 1961 : When Sam (Scott Bakula) becomes an attractive female secretary in 1961, he must deal with rampant sexism and his employer's lecherous advances. With Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: How the Tess Was Won - September 28, 1956 : Sam (Scott Bakula) finds himself on a Texas ranch in 1956 as a submissive veterinarian in love with a tough rancher (Kari Lizer). With Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: Double Identity - November 8, 1965 : Sam (Scott Bakula) becomes a hit man in 1965 whose romance with the godfather's (Michael Genovese) girlfriend (Terri Garber) places him in danger. With Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: The Color of Truth - August 8, 1955 : Sam (Scott Bakula) experiences racism firsthand when he leaps into the body of an elderly black man in the pre-civil rights South of 1955. Guest star: Susan French. With Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: Camikazi Kid - June 6, 1961 : Sam (Scott Bakula) leaps into the life of a teen-age hot-rodder who must stop his sister from marrying a wealthy bully. With Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: Play it Again, Seymour - April 14, 1953 : Sam (Scott Bakula) becomes a small-time detective in 1953 who is suspected of murdering his partner. With Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: A Portrait For Troian - February 7, 1971 : Sam (Scott Bakula) jumps into the life of a ``ghostbuster'' who has been asked to silence the other-world murmurings of a dead romance novelist. Deborah Pratt guest stars. With Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: Honeymoon Express - April 27, 1960 : Sam (Scott Bakula) assumes the identity of a newlywed New York policeman who is pursued by his bride's jealous ex-husband. With Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: Disco Inferno - April 1, 1976 : Sam Beckett remembers his own relationship with his older brother when Sam becomes a stuntman who must protect his younger brother from being killed while doing a stunt on a low-budget feature.

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: The Americanization of Machiko - August 4, 1953 : Sam (Scott Bakula) becomes a Pacific sailor returning from duty in 1953 with a Japanese war bride (Leila Hee Olsen) -- much to the dismay of his friends and family. With Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: Blind Faith - February 6, 1964 : Sam (Scott Bakula) leaps into the life of a blind concert pianist in 1964 who must prevent the death of a young woman. Also stars Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: Good Morning, Peoria - September 9, 1959 : Chubby Checker guest stars as himself in 1959 as Sam (Scott Bakula) becomes a radio DJ who is battling forces determined to remove rock 'n' roll from the airwaves. Also guest stars Patricia Richardson.

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: Thou Shalt Not.... February 2, 1974 : Sam (Scott Bakula) jumps into the life of a beleaguered rabbi who is desperately trying to reunite his torn family. Teri Hanauer and Russ Tamblyn guest star. With Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: Jimmy - October 14, 1964 : Sam (Scott Bakula) becomes a mentally challenged dock worker in 1964, harassed by co-workers, taunted by strangers and protected only by a caring brother. With Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: So Help Me, God... July 29, 1957 : Sam (Scott Bakula) becomes a Southern lawyer in 1957, charged with defending a black housekeeper who has willingly confessed to a murder she did not commit. With Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : On Graham's sofa are Warren Beatty talking about `Rules Don't Apply', Miranda Hart starring in `Annie', Keeley Hawes in TV series `The Durrells', and Peter Capaldi discusses his decision to leave `Doctor Who'. Plus, music from Jennifer Hudson.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Together on Graham's sofa are `X-Men' star James McAvoy with his co-star Sarah Paulson, iconic star of `Withnail and I' Richard E Grant, and Steve Coogan and John C Reilly. Also featuring music from Westlife.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Graham is joined by Dame Judi Dench who plays Queen Victoria in new film `Victoria and Abdul', Steve Carell and Kristen Wiig together in `Despicable Me 3', and Jamie Foxx who stars in musical caper `Baby Driver'. Plus, HAIM perform `Want You Back'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Together on Graham's sofa tonight: star of stage and screen, ex-Harry Potter Daniel Radcliffe; comedian Harry Hill; `Great British Bake Off' queen Mary Berry; superstar composer Andrew Lloyd-Webber; and music and chat from Sir Cliff Richard.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Together on Graham's sofa are star of stage and screen Sir Ian McKellen talking about his one-man stage show, Oscar-nominated Brit Carey Mulligan, `Kingsman' star Taron Egerton, and singing star Michael Buble performing `I Only Have Eyes For You'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Graham's guests include Oscar-winning Hollywood star Matthew McConaughey, wrestler-turned-actor John Cena, and actress and singer Hailee Steinfeld, as well as superstar chef Jamie Oliver. With music from Mark Ronson and Miley Cyrus.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Chris Hemsworth, Natalie Portman, Katy Perry, James Corden, Paul McCartney : On Graham's sofa tonight: the legendary Sir Paul McCartney, chatting and performing from his album `New'; star of `Thor 2', heart-throb Chris Hemsworth; Oscar-winning actress Natalie Portman; pop diva Katy Perry; and comedy star James Corden.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Joining Graham on the sofa among others are Hollywood superstar Will Smith, starring in football drama `Concussion' and Ryan Reynolds, reprising his superhero role in the new X-Men film `Deadpool'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Among the guests on Graham's sofa are star of stage and screen Sir Patrick Stewart, comedy genius Ricky Gervais, Oscar-nominated actress Regina King, director and actor Chiwetel Ejiofor, plus music from Jack Savoretti, performing `Candlelight'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Joining Graham on the sofa are Chris Hemsworth, Ron Howard, Lily Tomlin, Kevin Bridges, Blake and Dame Shirley Bassey.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Starring together on Graham's sofa are Hollywood superstars Dwayne `The Rock' Johnson and Oscar-nominated actress of `Moonlight' and `James Bond', Naomie Harris, together in monster movie `Rampage'. Featuring, music from Roger Daltrey.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Graham is joined on the sofa by Oscar winner Julianne Moore starring in film drama `Freeheld', Australian comedian and actress Rebel Wilson in `How to Be Single', and entertainment superstars Ant and Dec.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Among the guests are the stars of the film `Star Wars: The Last Jedi': Daisy Ridley, John Boyega, Gwendoline Christie, and Luke Skywalker himself: Mark Hamill. Also joining Graham is award-winning singer-songwriter Sam Smith, performing `Pray'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Together on Graham's sofa are Oscar-winner Denzel Washington appearing in `Fences', Fifty Shades star Jamie Dornan, Keanu Reeves starring in `John Wick: Chapter 2', legendary comedian and actress Whoopi Goldberg, and music from Rag'n'Bone Man.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Together on Graham's sofa are rock star Sir Elton John, actor and writer Stephen Fry, actress Carey Mulligan, pop star Robbie Williams, singer-songwriter P!nk, who performs `What About Us'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Graham is joined by actor and activist Jane Fonda, Nicole Kidman and Colin Farrell, who star together in `The Killing of a Sacred Deer', Bryan Cranston, who is performing at the National Theatre, and comedian Matt Lucas. With music from Niall Horan.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Together on Graham's sofa tonight: Brit actor Jude Law, starring in new gangster movie `Dom Hemingway'; comedian Greg Davies; Dot Cotton herself, June Brown; and chat and performance from pop sensation Lady Gaga.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : On Graham's sofa are movie royalty Sir Michael Caine and Morgan Freeman, both starring in `Going in Style', comedian Jack Whitehall and Gemma Whelan from `Game of Thrones' who are in BBC drama `Decline and Fall', and Take That.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Graham is joined on the sofa by Tina Fey, Amy Poehler, Quentin Tarantino, Kurt Russell and Sia.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The Graham Norton Show : Guests include Kylie Minogue, Simon Pegg, Michael McIntyre and Killers lead singer-songwriter Brandon Flowers.

channel.display-name: The Dog Whisperer with Caesar Millan

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Sunshine and Teddy : An owner worries that her Doberman suffers from separation anxiety; a yellow lab has a problem with biting.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Shep and Sasha : A wheelchair-bound owner wants to keep her German shepherd Shep in line; Sasha, the Lhasa apso, must learn who's boss.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Nicki : Cesar helps a Rottweiler who has suffered a lifetime of abuse adjust to her new life after finally finding a loving home.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Percy and Justice : A terrier rescued via the Internet is a handful to manage and bites anyone who tries to touch his hindquarters; pit bull problems.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Pepsi and Goldie : A family's German shepherd will only listen to one person; a Brittany spaniel becomes aggressive around female dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Boyfriend and Alfie : A family deals with a stray dog who bites; Daisy Fuentes has trouble controlling her English bulldog.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Buddy and Stewart : A dog barks all the time and might pose a threat to children; a beagle mix has lots of strange behaviors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Daisy and Sophie : A herding dog likes to bite the noses of horses; a family struggles with a dog who runs out the door as soon as it is opened.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Lucy and Lizzie : Cesar helps Lucy, an odd dalmatian who is affectionate one minute and angry the next and Lizzie who is obsessed with running all the time.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar's Worst Bite : Holly, a Labrador puppy, displays severe food aggression; a women's shelter will take a needy woman and her pit bull, Tucker, but Cesar must help the dog become less protective first.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Nunu and Kane : Chihuahua is a pint-sized peril to its owner's roommate; slobbering Great Dane afraid of shiny floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Flirt and Opie : A charmer around people, Opie becomes aggressive around other dogs; Flirt the Chinese Crested is hyper and neurotic.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Ruby and Rana : A vizsla with a biting problem is afraid of everything; a Shetland sheepdog barks at household appliances.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Josh and Boomer : Josh, a Maltese-poodle mix, won't let anyone go near him with a brush; Boomer, a clownish dog, must always be the center of attention.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Harry and Brooks : Harry goes crazy at anything on wheels; shadows drive Brooks crazy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Sueki and Coach : Cesar tries to help a boxer named Coach before he is put down for biting someone; Sueki turns her nose up at leads.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Slick & Pepper : Cesar tries to help Slick a fear-ridden dog who was rescued after living in a crate for 15 hours a day and Pepper, another rescue dog with issues.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Gus and Ava : Ava, a small mixed-breed spins constantly; Gus, a large dog who greets people by throwing its body at them.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Churchill and Maya : Churchill is usually a well-mannered dog, but around other animals he's a monster, and lovable pit bull Maya can be a handful.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Bubba and Garrett : Cesar takes the spoiled Bubba down a notch; discover why German shepherd Garret never stops chasing his tail.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Emily : Emily, the pit bull, is sent to doggie boot camp because she is so quick to attack other dogs that her owners can no longer walk her.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Hank and Paris : A rescued mastiff likes to chew everything and barks incessantly; Paris is a temperamental, long-haired Chihuahua.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Jake and King : When Linda tries to walk Jake, he goes mad to protect her; Chantel wants to walk her 150-pound Rottweiler King.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Scrawny and Lola : Scrawny is the favorite dog in his household, but popularity has gone to his head; Lola the dalmatian is spoiled.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Alice and J : A 12-year-old beagle mix displays unpredictable aggression; a couple tries to fit an aggressive puppy into their family.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Caper and Julius : Cesar helps Caper, a miniature Doberman rescue dog whose never been trained and Julius, a pit bull who is scared of everything.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Death : Grandpa's sole birthday wish is for Stan to take part in his assisted suicide. Meanwhile, Mrs. Broflovski has organized a protest against the boys' favorite TV show, "Terrance and Phillip."

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin : Mistaking Cartman for a starving African child, government authorities send him to Ethiopia where he runs into Sally Struthers.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip in Not Without My Anus : Terrance and Phillip must save Terrance's Little Daughter, Sally, and all of Canada from an evil dictator.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Chickenpox : The kids' parents only have their best interests at heart when they arrange for Stan, Kyle and Cartman to be exposed to the chickenpox virus.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cow Days : South Park's 14th Annual "Cow Days" rodeo and carnival is here and the boys are determined to win Terrance and Phillip dolls.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Spookyfish : When Sharon Marsh's Aunt Flo makes a monthly visit, she brings a mysterious pet fish for Stan.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Merry Christmas Charlie Manson! : Dinner with Cartman's family takes a bizarre twist when Uncle Howard shows up after breaking out of prison with the help of his cellmate, Charlie Manson.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Timmy 2000 : When Timmy is diagnosed with Attention Deficit Disorder, it triggers a wave of prescription drug abuse at South Park Elementary.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip: Behind the Blow : When the boys discover Terrance and Philip have called it quits, they'll go to any lengths to reunite the duo and recruit them for South Park's Earth Day festivities.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The New Terrance and Phillip Movie Trailer : All the kids in South Park are glued to the TV, wild with anticipation to see the first trailer for the latest Terrance and Phillip movie.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The Simpsons Already Did It : Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by "The Simpsons."

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: It's Christmas in Canada : The Brovlofski family is dealt a devastating blow when Ike's Canadian birth parents show up unexpectedly. When the townspeople decide to forego Christmas gifts and take up a collection to get Ike home to South Park, the boys are distraught.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Canada On Strike : The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Eat, Pray, Queef : Someone plays an April Fool’s joke on the boys and it doesn’t go over well.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Crème Fraiche : Randy’s obsession with the Food Network forces Sharon to explore a new interest of her own.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Royal Pudding : The Prince of Canada is about to take a Princess and Ike is obsessed with the Royal Wedding.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Crack Baby Athletic Association : Kyle gets in on the ground floor of Cartman’s latest business venture, The Crack Baby Athletic Association.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Taming Strange : When Ike hits puberty, he and Kyle start to grow apart. To save their relationship, Kyle takes Ike to see a live performance of Yo Gabba Gabba.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Freemium Isn't Free : Stan is addicted to the new Terrance and Phillip mobile game.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Where My Country Gone? : Garrison wants to build a wall to keep out all of the undocumented immigrants.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: SUPER HARD PCness : It’s never been more challenging to be a PC Principal.

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A Matter of Perspective : The widow of respected scientist Dr. Nel Apgar accuses Riker of seducing her and killing her husband. Rather than turn Riker over for unfavorable trial, the Enterprise reconstructs the facts.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Yesterday's Enterprise : The Enterprise C enters the Enterprise D's time and space continuum, where they find Picard and crew in a constant state of war with the Klingons, and only Guinan knows it.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Offspring : After returning from a cybernetics conference to the Enterprise, Data creates his own "child," much to the chagrin of his captain, and without regards to the ramifications with Starfleet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Sins of the Father : A Klingon commander boards the Enterprise in an officer exchange program initiated by Starfleet, much to the chagrin of the crew.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Allegiance : Picard is kidnapped and held with three different aliens and meanwhile replaced with a replica as impostor captain.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Captain's Holiday : After mediating a difficult peace agreement, Captain Picard is encouraged to take a much needed rest on a vacationing planet, where he's visited by a strange race from the future, in search of a dangerous weapon.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tin Man : The Enterprise reaches out to an alien being while dancing around with the Romulans, who want to attack it in an act of vengeance.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Hollow Pursuits : A shy member of the "Enterprise" crew becomes addicted to the holodeck, where relationships are easier there than in real life, when his knowledge is needed in engineering.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Most Toys : When transporting a dangerous material to the Enterprise, Data is kidnapped and the crew is led to believe he is dead when the shuttlecraft he was piloting explodes enroute.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Sarek : Legendary Federation ambassador Sarek visits the Enterprise to conclude peace talks with a race called the Legarans.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Menage a Troi : When Deanna's mother spurns advances made by a Ferengi Daimon, he takes it upon himself to kidnap the two of them, along with Commander Riker and steal them away aboard his ship.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.desc: Hollow Pursuits : A shy member of the "Enterprise" crew becomes addicted to the holodeck, where relationships are easier there than in real life, when his knowledge is needed in engineering.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Omega Glory : The Enterprise finds a planet devastated by disease that appears to treat the American flag with great reverence.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Ultimate Computer : Starfleet uses the Enterprise to test a new super-sophisticated computer, but it soon develops a mind of its own.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Bread And Circuses : The Enterprise crew investigates the disappearance of a ship's crew on a planet that is a modern version of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Assignment: Earth : Kirk must decide whether to thwart or help a traveller from the future sent back to 1960s Earth on a secret mission.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: A Private Little War : Kirk becomes involved in an arms race when the Klingons equip a native people with superior weaponry.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Return To Tomorrow : The U.S.S. Enterprise tracks a mysterious SOS to an ancient planet presumed long dead.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Patterns Of Force : Enterprise is sent to planet Ekos to investigate a disappearance of Federation historian John Gill.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: By Any Other Name : The Enterprise's command crew must thwart an invasion by aliens from another galaxy who plan to conquer this one.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Spock's Brain : The crew of the Enterprise pursues a mysterious woman who has abducted Spock's brain.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise Incident : Captain Kirk becomes increasingly erratic and orders the Enterprise into Romulan space. Here, the ship is captured by a beautiful Romulan commander.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash Bridges : Don Johnson is Nash Bridges, a San Francisco police investigator who deserves his reputation as the city’s top cop. Nash relies on his instincts, a keen sense of humor and a lot of charm to work his magic on the streets of San Francisco.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From Tech-Genius To Unmotivated Mess : Logan, 30, desperately needs help. Mom Tracy says he has gone from a productive computer science engineer to a shell of a human being: no motivation, rarely eats, & can barely function to take care of his basic hygiene needs. Can Logan get back on track?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Our Device Addicted Violent Teen Controls The House : Kathi says son, Nico, 14, plays video games all day & charged thousands buying tokens. Nico attended only six days of school this year & when disciplined, Nico rages, curses & terrorizes. Kathi says he learned this behavior from his dad, Evo; Evo agrees.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Heaviest Woman On Record : At 700 lbs., Pauline, 48, has a Guinness World Record title of Heaviest Living Woman. Pauline is also a mother, daughter & friend with hopes and dreams of a better life for herself & her 18-year-old son Dillon. Can Dr. Phil help get her life on track?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: My Wife Or My Girlfriend, Dr. Phil, You Decide : Melvin says he is torn between his wife of eight years, Rachel, and his girlfriend of two years, Chantelle, and he wants Dr. Phil to help decide whom he should choose. When the women meet face to face for the first time, does Dr. Phil help him choose?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Molested & Abused For Over 10 Years, Why Won't My Grandma Believe Me Pt. 1 : Ashley and Megan claim they were molested for years by their step-grandfather and their grandmother, Peggy, knew it was happening but did not stop it. The sisters face Peggy for the first time in seven years. Why does Peggy say they are lying? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Teen Love Trauma : What happens when an unhealthy relationship threatens to tear a mother and daughter apart? Giesel says her 18-year-old daughter is boyfriend-obsessed and is damaging her promising future. Watch drama unfold as a pregnancy scare rocks this teen's life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Missing "Van Life" Woman's Father Speaks Out: The Dr. Phil Interview Pt. 1 : A father pleads for help regarding his missing daughter. Gabby Petito, 22, set off on a van trip with her fiancé, but two months later he returned alone. Police revealed the couple had an incident--caught on camera. Gabby's dad is determined to find her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Our Son Was Making Millions, But Is Now Living In Our Garage With His Girlfriend : Mike and Vicki say their 37-year-old son, Ryan, once made millions running a successful real estate company, but for the past three months, he has been living in their garage with his 24-year-old girlfriend, Rachel. Dr. Phil asks Ryan tough questions.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: My Daughter Is Delusional And Lying About Being 9 Months Pregnant Pt. 1 : Kristi says daughter Haley has always been a compulsive liar. She says lies Haley has told are that she was a contestant on American Idol, rapper Eminem is her father and she’s diagnosed paranoid schizophrenic. Now she says she's 9 months pregnant. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Painfully Ill: Can Monica Be Saved? : Monica's old life: English teacher, marathon runner, happy. Now 90 lbs. and no solid food with a C-diff diagnosis, she chains herself to bed to avoid sleepwalking or binge eating. It's a full-time job for mom, Stephanie; friend Breanna suspects enabling.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: My Husband Pablo And His Other Women : Dr. Phil offers to help a couple salvage their marriage in what resembles a real-life version of Cameron Diaz's movie, The Other Woman. Anna says Pablo cheats. Tensions run high when three women face Pablo. Dr. Phil enlists the help of Bishop T.D. Jakes.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trapped : When you and your beloved say "I do," it's "for better or worse." But what happens when all you feel is the "worse" part and wind up trapped in a bad marriage?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: An Addict In The Family : While battling cancer, Paula learned her 21-year-old daughter, C.J., had been turning to drugs, and that her husband had an affair. Can this family come together to save C.J.?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A Bitter Custody Battle: Claims Of Poison In Ice Cream, A Child Wrapped In A Garbage Bag And Inappropriate Touching: What Will The Polygraph Reveal Pt. 2 : Sandra and ex-husband Joey admit they’re in a bitter custody battle. Sandra and Joey’s mudslinging has frightening accusations, but are they telling the truth? See what happens when these parents are offered polygraph and drug tests. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Held Hostage By My Father : Ashley was sexually abused by her father from ages of 5 to 18, locked in a small camper, while giving birth to four of her father's children. In her first national interview since her father's arrest, the 22-year-old mom speaks about her horrible ordeal.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Catfish Controversy: A Mom & Son Face Off Pt. 2 : Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Nancy, who adamantly denies her online love relationship with "Shaun" is a scam. Nancy and her son Darcy speak face-to-face for the first time in over a year. Plus updates from past catfished guests!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil's Big Ultimatum: Will Accused Mother Heather Go To Rehab? Pt. 2 : Dr. Phil continues his interview with Heather & Brian, feuding parents over 15-yr-old son Brandon's death. Hear from Brandon's friends, the last to see him alive and two of the young men make shocking allegations against Heather. How does she respond?

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love Island Australia : Jessie and Eoghan spend the night together in the hideaway. In the villa the twins and Phoebe start spreading rumours about Vanessa. Matt and Vanessa has it out and come out of the situation together still, but only just.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love Island Australia : Gerard is relieved to still be in the villa, but now he's the only single person left. Matthew suffers from the rumours flying around the villa, and Vanessa confronts him about not coming to her defense when the whispering began.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love Island Australia : Feelings develop following the challenge, and two islanders will leave the villa, in the most intense dumping ever.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love Island Australia : The Bomb Squad drops in to stir things up between the islanders. While the boys play, the girls are exiled to the Hideaway.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love Island Australia : The OG girls are worrying about the new arrivals, and not without reason. After a nude breakfast and a round of kissing, Gerard is declared the best kisser among the guys. Eoghan has eyes for Issabelle, but he'll have to win her over from Luke.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love Island Australia : A game of truth or dare reveals some competition for Jordan's affections between Matthew and Eoghan. Luke can't seem to make up his mind when it comes to either Issabelle and Cassie. New Aaron shakes things up when he arrives in the villa in style.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love Island Australia : Aaron has to save two of the four single girls from leaving the villa, and decides on Biancca and Jessie. Gerard and Jessie have a chat by the deck. Cassie grills Luke on what happened while she was gone, and she doesn't like what she finds out.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love Island Australia : Aaron has to save two of the four single girls from leaving the villa, and decides on Biancca and Jessie. Gerard and Jessie have a chat by the deck. Cassie grills Luke on what happened while she was gone, and she doesn't like what she finds out.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love Island Australia : Aaron and Cynthia spend a romantic evening getting to know each other, while Adam and Cartier get up close and personal after a night spent together in the hideaway. Anna and Cassie have a conversation about the perils of social media.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love Island Australia : With Eoghan's departure, Matt admits that he has feelings for Isabelle, who finds herself torn between him and a recently re-available Jordan. Aaron and Cynthia, and Gerard and Jessie take their relationships to the next level.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love Island Australia : Matt finally comes to terms with the decision he made, and sits down with Isabelle for a chat. The other islanders gossip about what they think he will say. Love Day in the villa comes with surprises and sexy situations galore.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love Island Australia : Jessie and Isabelle return from their dates feeling amazing. Josh looks like he's about to have some harsh words with the new guys. As Halloween dawns, the boys quickly get to scaring as many of the girls as they can.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love Island Australia : The decision of an islander rocks the villa during an emotional recoupling and the couples start to crumble under the pressure.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love Island Australia : Adam and Cartier's relationship is in full breakdown and Aaron tries to set up a date with Cynthia. Meanwhile, Cassie confronts Luke about the things he's been saying about her.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love Island Australia : Adam is hoping a new girl will arrive to sweep him off his feet. Margarita arrives at the villa, much to the interest of Matthew and Jessie. Aaron and Cynthia hang out, and a few sparks fly.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Ghost Ship : Harm and Mac investigate the discovery of a skeleton found hidden aboard a decommissioned aircraft carrier that is being cut up for scrap, and learn it is all that remains of a long-missing JAG officer.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The Court Martial of Sandra Gilbert : The top female gunship pilot at the Yuma Marine Base is charged with disobeying an order to stop "fraternizing" with her crew chief, a married, enlisted man. Mac is assigned as prosecutor and Harm is set as Susan's defense attorney.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: King of the Fleas : Having just stabbed a man on a street-corner, Willie, a wheelchair-bound former Vietnam POW arrives at JAG headquarters to report "a 30-year-old murder" which he's just committed. Willie relates that while imprisoned he knew Harm's father.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Secrets : Admiral Chegwidden, Mac and Bud Roberts are taken hostage in the Admiral's office by Pvt. Magida, a Marine who escaped from a nearby Federal prison.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Trinity : Harm and his new partner, Marine Major Sara MacKenzie are drawn into a game of revenge when they're sent to Belfast, Ireland, to represent the legal interests of a Navy Lieutenant whose infant son has seemingly been abducted.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Ghosts : Harm and Mac investigate an attempt on Admiral Chedwiggen's life and uncover the fact that all the members of his former SEAL team have died under mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Full Engagement : While on their day off, Harm takes Mac for a flight in his vintage airplane, only to be forced to make an emergency landing in a mountain clearing because of mechanical problems.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The Guardian : Harm and Mac defend Bauwer, a former Navy Seal, now a homeless man, who's accused of using excessive force when he killed three men who tried to hold up a convenience store.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Cowboys and Cossaks : Harm, Mac, and Bud are assigned sea duty to monitor a joint war games exercise between U.S. and Russian naval forces.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Rendevous : Mac and Harm once again find themselves courtroom adversaries as Mac is assigned the difficult task of defending CPO Holst, an admitted wife abuser accused of murdering his wife's boyfriend.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Ghost Ship : Harm and Mac investigate the discovery of a skeleton found hidden aboard a decommissioned aircraft carrier that is being cut up for scrap, and learn it is all that remains of a long-missing JAG officer.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The Court Martial of Sandra Gilbert : The top female gunship pilot at the Yuma Marine Base is charged with disobeying an order to stop "fraternizing" with her crew chief, a married, enlisted man. Mac is assigned as prosecutor and Harm is set as Susan's defense attorney.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: King of the Fleas : Having just stabbed a man on a street-corner, Willie, a wheelchair-bound former Vietnam POW arrives at JAG headquarters to report "a 30-year-old murder" which he's just committed. Willie relates that while imprisoned he knew Harm's father.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Vanished : Concerns regarding the mysterious disappearance of a fully armed Navy F-14 during a storm lead Harm's investigation to consider such diverse scenarios as pilot suicide, terrorism, the Bermuda Triangle curse, or UFO interference.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Against All Enemies : Harm, Mac and Bud board an aircraft carrier in the Sea of Japan to investigate the accidental shooting down of a North Korean civilian airliner by Navy jets.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Impact : Hetty asks operational psychologist Nate Getz (Peter Cambor) to help Deeks and Sam return to work; a controversial journalist is murdered.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Omni : The team hunts for a person who jeopardized a classified vaccine project; Deeks must deal with his emotions as he returns to the field.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Reznikov, N. : The team winds up in danger as they investigate the kidnapping of a man claiming to be Callen's father.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Unwritten Rule : A former Navy officer's girlfriend is kidnapped, and demands are made for classified intelligence; Deeks accidentally breaks one of Hetty's rules.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Big Brother : When a 15-year-old hacker compromises missions, Callen goes undercover at a prestigious high school.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: The Livelong Day : The team must alert Homeland Security when they uncover a threat to a Los Angeles-based train during a murder investigation.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Fallout : The team must locate and retrieve a stolen antiterrorism device before the city is attacked; Hetty is haunted by her past.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Recovery : Kensi and Deeks go under cover at a rehab center named Tranquility Villa to investigate a Navy officer's death.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: The Frozen Lake : Sam and Callen ask an elite Nepali soldier skilled in knife fighting for help retrieving a thumb drive; Deeks and Kensi try to find a balance.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Iron Curtain Rising : When a former Romanian Communist leader and suspected war criminal is discovered to be living in Los Angeles under a false identity, the NCIS: LA team must locate him before he disappears again.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Merry Evasion : The team looks for a motive when a senator's daughter (Michelle Trachtenberg) is attacked; a co-worker gives Kensi a perfect gift.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Allegiance : A federal agent's murder is linked to an ancient system of money transfer; Granger and Kensi work with the team from Afghanistan.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: War Cries : The investigation into the murder of two private military contractors ends up putting a member of the team in grave danger; Sam arranges a blind date for Callen.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Tuhon : Callen and Sam search for a murder suspect -- a retired assassin (Danny Trejo) they encountered on their first case together.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Fish Out Of Water : The team and an undercover DEA agent must determine if an explosion at a fish market was an act of terror or a smuggling deal gone wrong; a helicopter crash may be tied to Kensi and Granger's search for the white ghost.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Between The Lines : When a gang identifies and executes an undercover agent, the team must locate a mole before other agents are put in danger.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Zero Days : Eric witnesses his friend, a computer systems expert, being attacked by people who want information that could redirect a missile; Kensi runs into a familiar face in Afghanistan.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham One Two Three
programme.desc: The Taking of Pelham One Two Three : A gang hijacks a subway train and threaten to kill the hostages one by one until their demands are met. Forced to stall, transit chief Lt. Garber (Walter Matthau) must outmaneuver one of the craftiest and cruelest screen villains (Robert Shaw) ever.

programme.title: Sunset In Wyoming
programme.desc: Sunset In Wyoming : Conscientious rancher Gene Autry must save his valley from flooding caused by a lumber company that is stripping the land. Gene hatches a plan to declare the mountain a state park and wildlife shrine.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Hour Of The Gun : Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: The White Buffalo
programme.desc: The White Buffalo : Charles Bronson and Will Sampson star as Wild Bill Hickok and Chief Crazy Horse in this one-of-a-kind western that finds both western legends braving the snowy wilderness in search of the demon that haunts them both, the fabled White Buffalo!

programme.title: Man With The Gun
programme.desc: Man With The Gun : Robert Mitchum portrays an Exterminator--in the American West. He will, for a price, eliminate any outlaws annoying the peace of any Western town. When his wife, in disgust, leaves him, he pursues her, only to encounter his greatest gunfighting challenge.

programme.title: Greaser's Palace
programme.desc: Greaser's Palace : A parable based on the life of Christ. This ain't your father's Bible story, full of references about the destruction of the world through massive constipation and a New Mexican setting.

programme.title: Last Of The Pony Riders
programme.desc: Last Of The Pony Riders : Gene Autry tries to set up a stage line to carry government mail. Schemers try to get the government assignment for their own stage line, and plan to discredit the Pony Express by causing accidents.

programme.title: The Conners

programme.title: The Conners

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Two More Years and A Stolen Rose : The death of a beloved teacher from Dan and Jackie's high school brings old classmates together; Becky asks Darlene and Ben for a big favour.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Stuck in the Middle and Stuck in the Past : Darlene and Ben get into a fight and ignore Becky's boundaries in the house; Dan accuses Jackie of losing all of their home videos.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: New Pipes and Old Secrets : Darlene has issues with Dan's plumbing work in her new house; Jackie tries to find a caregiver for Bev.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Adding Insult to Injury : Darlene continues her search for a new job; Becky is desperate to spend more time with Beverly Rose.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Possums, Pregnancy and Patriarchy : Harris makes a big announcement; Ben is overwhelmed with family responsibilities.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Hiding In and Moving Out : Harris takes her anger out on Darlene; Dan and Louise spend an entire day in bed together.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Contra Hearings and the Midnight Gambler : Mark fights for a spot in the Lanford High chamber orchestra; Jackie puts a lottery machine in the Lunch Box.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Road Trip and Guilt Trip : Dan and Jackie take a road trip to a hardware wholesaler in Oklahoma; Darlene heads out of town and leaves behind a plethora of to-do notes for Becky and Ben.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Text Thread and Marrital Bed : Louise gets into a feud with Becky after accidentally sending a rude message in the family text thread; Darlene tries to spice up her sex life with Ben.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: What's So Funny About Peas, Love and Understanding? : Darlene figures out a new plan to afford Mark's college tuition; Jackie and Louise try to help Becky meet a new guy.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dating, Drinking and Grifter Logic : Neville confronts Jackie about loaning Dan money; Darlene attempts to play matchmaker for Mark.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Grad Finale : As Mark's graduation approaches, he considers his relationship with his father; Louise plans a big graduation ceremony at the Lunch Box.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Keep On Truckin' : A sudden turn of events forces the Conners to face the daily struggles of life in Lanford in a way they never have before.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Tangled Up in Blue : Darlene is in for one surprise after another when David introduces his girlfriend, Blue (Juliette Lewis), at a parent-teacher conference and mentions that Mark and Harris will be spending the weekend with them.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: There Won't Be Blood : It's Halloween, the favorite time of year for the Conners, but an email from the school banning certain costumes, including Mark's, sets off an argument between Dan and Darlene. J

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Seperation of Church and Dan : Geena learns that D.J. hasn't been taking Mary to church while she's been away, so insists they go as a family to uphold her traditional values.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Miracles : A family member drops a life-changing announcement; Dan suspects that Becky isn't sticking to her end of the deal about her drinking; Darlene continues her job search; Jackie offers English lessons to a needful La Casita Bonita busboy.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: One Flew Over The Conners' Nest : With Mark and Mary's help, Jackie convinces Dan to build a chicken coop in the backyard so the family can eat organic eggs, but from a bird's-eye view, it appears that she may have ulterior motives.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Hold The Salt : Dan questions Peter's motives when he learns about the pricey Christmas gift Jackie purchased for her new, unemployed beau. Elsewhere, Mark and Mary write up their Christmas wish lists, while Darlene receives advice from an unlikely source.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: O Sister, Where Art Thou? : When Becky helps Harris keep a secret from Darlene, it opens up a can of worms that causes a rift between the two sisters. Jackie supports Peter with his Nordic history project, and Dan reunites with an old friend.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Rage Against the Machine : When Dan gets injured on the job covering D.J.'s vending machine route, the choice to sue the company could lead to D.J. getting fired. Meanwhile, Jackie is appalled when Becky seeks life coaching from her nemesis.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Don't Shoot the Piano Teacher : When Ben offers Mark free piano lessons, Darlene finds this as an opportunity to test his parenting skills. Meanwhile, Jackie throws Becky a baby shower, and Emilio continues his efforts to be part of the baby's life.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: We Contine to Truck : As Darlene grapples with a life-changing offer from Ben, an unexpected conversation with David turns her world even more upside down. Relationship problems lead Jackie to the bottom of the bottle at the last place she remembers being truly happy.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Preemies, Weed and Infidelity : After Emilio's deportation, Jackie takes on a paternal role crafting a birth plan for Becky; Darlene navigates a love triangle with David and Ben; Harris faces her own dilemma.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Kiss Is Just a Kiss : Darlene struggles to decide between David and Ben; Becky begins to doubt herself as a mom; Mark gets in trouble at school when a picture of him and his boyfriend kissing goes viral.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Preemie Monologues : Harris confronts Darlene's lifestyle; Jackie meddles in others' affairs to evade her own issues; Becky struggles with the expenses of parenthood, her family lends support.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Lanford…Lanford : Becky's bartending gig worries Dan; Darlene weighs David versus Ben; Harris' new pal, Odessa, spells trouble.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Nightmare on Lunch Box Street : Jackie's Halloween is a nightmare when she discovers a dark secret; Mary's upset over assumptions about her adoption; Darlene juggles love interests.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Tempest in a Stew Pot : Jackie and Becky pitch their business plan to Darlene in hopes of getting the Lunch Box back, but Darlene's decision leads to hostility among the three.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Slappy Holidays : Thanksgiving chaos erupts as Dan gathers the family; tensions rise over the Lunch Box; Harris surprises everyone with a bold move.

programme.title: Pokemon the Series

programme.title: Pokemon the Series
programme.desc: Jump for Joy! : Ash and friends stop at a Pokémon Center for directions, but there's no sign of Nurse Joy! What could have happened to her?

programme.title: Pokemon the Series
programme.desc: A Different Kind of Misty : Ash and friends visit a lighthouse, where they try to return a stolen item they recovered from Team Rocket—but the lighthouse keepers think our heroes are the thieves!

programme.title: Pokemon the Series
programme.desc: A Poké-BLOCK Party : Ash and friends join the Trick House Contest, which sends them through a maze full of tricks and traps—and, of course, Team Rocket!

programme.title: Pokemon the Series

programme.title: Pokemon the Series

programme.title: Pokemon the Series

programme.title: Pokemon the Series

programme.title: Pokemon the Series

programme.title: Pokemon the Series

programme.title: Pokemon the Series

programme.title: Pokemon the Series

programme.title: Pokemon the Series

programme.desc: Cold to the Touch : Behind the scenes of a police investigation into the shocking death of an 11-week-old baby, a crime that leaves experienced officers dismayed by what they find but determined to pursue justice for the baby boy.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Cold to the Touch : Behind the scenes of a police investigation into the tragic, shocking death of an 11-week-old baby; a crime that leaves experienced officers shocked and dismayed by what they find, but determined to pursue justice for the baby boy.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: The Murder of Rikki Neave : Twenty-seven years after the devastating murder of 6-year-old Rikki Neave, police conduct another investigation with newly found DNA evidence of Rikki's murderer.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: The Murder of Rikki Neave : James Watson, who was a 13-year-old boy at the time of 6-year-old Rikki Neave's murder, is arrested under suspicion of murder after new DNA evidence is found.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody

programme.title: Autopsy

programme.title: Autopsy

programme.desc: Jim Morrison : One of rock music's controversial icons, Jim Morrison earned critical acclaim and and army of fans as well as a reputation as a rebel.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Meltdown : Tuna.com is back in the lead over Pin Wheel in week nine of the fishing season; Bounty Hunter feels the tension because of their lack of fish this season; Tyler reaches his breaking point; Dave M. is desperate to catch a big one.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Captain Carnage : After an intense week, where Dave fired Paul as first mate on FV-tuna.com, the two friends-turned-foes are now competing against each other to see who will catch more fish.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: All Hands on Deck : With four weeks left, two of the boats face the challenge of having novice fishermen on board, which could make or break their season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Uncharted Territory : As the summer comes to an end and the water temperature drops, the bluefin start their migration to the Mediterranean and the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Twice Bitten : A stroke of luck helps Pin Wheel close in on leaders FV- Tuna.com, but with just two weeks of tuna fishing to go, they aren't the only boat that strikes gold.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Money on the Line : Gloucester's reigning champion, Capt. Dave Carraro, starts the last week of the fishing season with a nearly $20,000 lead over his New Hampshire rival, the Pin Wheel.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Endgame : The FV-Tuna.com remains in the lead but hasn't caught a fish this week; rival Pin Wheel has two fish on deck and has a third in its sights.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: The Wicked Return : The fishermen of Gloucester, are feeling confident as they take to the open seas in hopes of catching the first fish of the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Checkmate : After fishing alone McLaughlin realizes that he needs help, so he brings two college friends on board who lack fishing experience.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Into the Storm : With a major storm on the horizon and the fish biting, Gloucester's fishermen have to brave the weather.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Operation T.U.N.A. : Capt. Dave Carraro resorts to espionage like tactics to find what he needs; Capt. Dave Marciano and Capt. Tyler McLaughlin form an unlikely alliance.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Bite Fight : Having caught only one fish by the start of week five, Tyler, captain of the Pins Wheel goes to his lucky fishing spot to discover a rival captain is already there.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Mission: Fishin! : It's a close battle for the title of top-earning boat as Gloucester's bluefin tuna fleet charges into the heart of the fishing season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Bad Latitude : Burdened by the responsibility of providing for their families and crew, the captains grow desperate to catch and tempers flare.

programme.title: Our Christmas Wedding
programme.desc: Our Christmas Wedding : Roles reverse as Nicole's boss plans newly engaged Nicole and Michael's wedding in two weeks at Christmas.

programme.title: Love Hacks
programme.desc: Love Hacks : Relationship coach Sam believes she can fix any romance and she's creating a podcast to prove it, but fun-loving producer Josh challenges her to put her own heart to the test.

programme.title: The Boyfriend Trap
programme.desc: The Boyfriend Trap : Identical twins Alice and Lacey are mistaken for each other on a retreat. They decide to go with it just for the trip, soon they realize that they may have been wrong about who and what they needed in their lives all along.

programme.title: Falling for the Manny
programme.desc: Falling for the Manny : When single mom Alice finds herself up for partner at her firm, there's just one obstacle: the annual partners family retreat. Alice hires her sister's manny, Jacob, to help look after her 9-year-old daughter while they're away.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Dreamer : When Ty is admitted to the hospital, Amy and the family come together.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Greater Expectations : The Heartland family welcomes a new member.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Baby on Board : Ty struggles with control issues when his mom stops by for an unexpected visit, in hopes of bonding with her granddaughter.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores
programme.desc: Love Eventually : With Trace still on the road, Abby and Trace find a way to combat the loneliness; Bree has to define a new normal, as do Mick and Megan, who begin to suspect that old feelings never go away; Sarah is injured on the job.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: Guilty Until Proven Innocent
programme.desc: Garage Sale Mystery: Guilty Until Proven Innocent : Antiques guru Jennifer Shannon (Lori Loughlin) investigates a murder after an old college friend becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Decision Time : Tim steps up Jade's training regimen when a new competitor shows up.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Honestly, Elizabeth : The sudden arrival of Lucas' mother makes Elizabeth more than a little nervous; Lee injures his back; a newcomer's arrival causes Rosemary to reflect on what she wants in life.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Mike Gets Medieval : Danny trusts Horny Mike to paint a Medieval mural on a '73 GMC Pick Up truck, and soon regrets his decision.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: The Magic Bus : It's all hands on deck when Danny and the guys get to work transforming a 1960 Volkswagen Bus into a high end luxury beach cruiser. But an unexpected hiccup threatens to derail the whole project.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Heroes and Horsepower : Danny and the guys can't wait to get started on a 1964 and a half Ford Mustang. But once they dig in, they find some creative and dangerous repairs, some they didn't even think were possible!

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: All Charged Up : Danny and the crew go all in, building the ultimate, fully customized 1968 Dodge Charger, while Ryan and Shannon make a father and son's dream come true restoring their incredible 1959 Harley Davidson Panhead Chopper.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: GTO Dreams : When Ryan and Ghetto Bob buy a '67 Pontiac GTO, they don't realize that Danny misses his old GTO so much, he might not let the client have this one!

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Fast & Dangerous : A 1977 Corvette Stingray arrives with seven layers of paint and too many problems to count. The restoration makes no sense, but Dan takes it. A 1965 Cobra is brought in for a simple wiring job. Then, the owner decides to wrap the car like a fighter jet.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Mach Speed : Mike wants Dan to make his prized Mach 1 even more of a muscle car. Richard brings FantomWorks the first ‘his and hers’ restoration – a Sunbeam Tiger and a Fiat Spider – but as Dan soon discovers; the challenges of the two cars are not equal.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Ticket to Ride : When the 1941 Buick Coupe rolls into FantomWorks, it is the worst possible combination: a very difficult car and very demanding owner. Janelle wants her KZ-750 transformed into a cool stripped down ‘café’ bike – a challenge for FantomWorks new bike shop.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Size Does Matter : The owner of a C10 pick-up wants a full frame off restoration and as Dan predicted, things get ugly when they peel off the paint. A Heinkel came in with mismatched scooter parts hiding an incredibly rare car - which makes parts almost impossible to find.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Buyer Beware : A 1917 Overland will be FantomWorks oldest restoration, if they can solve this jigsaw puzzle of rotted wood and rusted steel. Dan buys a 1968 Camaro on the internet for his wife, Malissa, and finds out that the car is in extremely poor condition.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: All Or Nothing : Brad wants a 1967 Mustang Coupe to be new again; so Dan has to fight the way the car was initially built by the factory. Jay wants a stunning 1965 TR4, but he plans to do most of the work himself. Instead, the Fantomworks side of the job keeps growing.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Hidden Surprises : Emmett believes his 1964 Barracuda is all original. But Dan finds out that the car has hidden damage and a past that nobody expected. Velvet wants Dan to get her 1953 Studebaker Commander running as a surprise for her husband, Travis.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Wrangle This : When Gray brings his 1929 Phaeton in, Dan uncovers deadly dangers that lead to lifesaving repairs. Tony believes his 1989 Jeep Wrangler is 95% done, but the car is a rolling disaster of bad work, tangled wires and incompatible parts.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Race To The Finish : Steve wants to run his 1954 Oldsmobile in a thousand-mile road race. Dan faces a tight budget, a tough schedule and race rules. Jim wants Fantomworks to bring his 1977 Spitfire out of a coma; but Dan puts his foot down when safety issues are discovered.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Good After Bad : Michael wants a new convertible top for his 1953 Morgan, but the Fantomworks team has no reference, no template and no anchor points. Butch entrusted his 1969 Camaro to a restoration rip-off artist. Can Fantomworks fix the worst work they’ve ever seen?

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Twists & Turns : A violent convict may be faking paralysis as part of a prison escape plan; a young man seems to be suffocating for no apparent reason; a father is stabbed in the heart trying to protect his son; a college cheerleader mysteriously goes into cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: The Art of Raw Food : Martha and Omar Abou-Ismail make miso soup and a bean-free hummus with flatbread made with raw ingredients; Martha and Omar whip up a tabouli salad followed by sweet potato fries.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Mexican Cuisine : Chef Lazaro Perez joins Martha in her kitchen to cook a fiesta-inspired feast of carnitas and homemade tortillas, shrimp in a spicy chili sauce, and the iconic Martha-rita.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Arethusa Farm Dairy's Award Winning Cheese : Martha road trips to Arethusa Farm in Bantam, CT, and learns how they make their award-winning Europa cheese, visits their cheese caves, and makes their delicious cheesy risotto recipe.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Tomato Show : Martha shares her favorite tomato recipes from a tomato tart to Martha's favorite BLT to a simple marinara sauce.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: French Bistro Night : Martha gets a first-hand look behind the delicious French dishes at Cenadou Bistrot including mussels in a tomato sauce with housemade croutons and a flatbread topped with olives and anchovies.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: How to Properly Cook an Egg : Meet Martha in one of her favorite places on the farm - the chicken coop to talk about one of her favorite things to eat - eggs; Martha will share her top methods for making an egg-cellent breakfast.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Pasta Night : Tonight is pasta night in Bedford; Martha and friends make three pasta dishes, including a recipe from her new restaurant, The Bedford, a no-knife spaghetti, and a lemon angel hair pasta.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu : Martha prepares pot-au-feu, a hearty french dish of root vegetables and various cuts of meat, all braised in a savory broth; It's served with sliced meat, vegetables and delicious accompaniments!

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Paella on an Open Fire : Martha creates the perfect menu for a paella party that will have your guests coming back for seconds; her paella is served with gazpacho and her incredible sangria.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Vietnamese Cuisine : Martha creates an incredible Vietnamese feast with her friend Monica Tran, including lettuce-wrapped golden fried spring rolls, traditional pho soup, and savory sizzling pancakes.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Sweet and Savory Apple Dishes : Martha makes homemade apple cider, a tender pork roast with apples and braised red cabbage; and of course, we can't have an apple show without dessert.

programme.title: Martha Bakes

programme.title: Nurse Jackie

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: School Nurse : Jackie and Kevin consider enrolling Grace in private school; Dr. O'Hara must endure a boy's emotional thanks; Zoey loses a patient.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Daffodil : Jackie breaks rules to help a girl, caring for her mother; Mrs. Akalitus tasers herself; O'Hara treats Zoey to a meal.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Final Rounds: Rush to the Battle Arena! : The day of the Exam finally arrives. Naruto’s first opponent is Neji Hyuga.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Byakugan vs. Shadow Clone Technique! : Finally, the Chunin Exam starts with the eight Ninja who qualified in the preliminaries. But Sasuke is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Ultimate Defence: Zero Blind Spot! : Naruto is unable to use his Shadow Clone Jutsu against Neji who can see chakra points!

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: A Failure's True Power : Naruto and Neji’s battle continues with Neji showing enormous power.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Hit it or Quit it: The Final Rounds Get Complicated! : Defeated by Naruto, Neji is being taken to the hospital, when Neji’s uncle Hiashi appears.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Zero Motivation: The guy with cloud envy! : Sasuke’s match is postponed and suddenly, it is Shikamaru’s turn.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Dancing Leaf, Squirming Sand : In Shikamaru and Temari’s match, Shikamaru who had the upper hand suddenly makes a surprising decision!

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Bushy Brow's Jutsu: Sasuke Style! : Sasuke and Gaara’a anticipated match begins. Gaara eerily talks to himself, as though addressing someone.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Late for the Show, But Ready to Go! The Ultimate Secret Technique is Born! : Sasuke's speed and moves are identical to Lee’s Taijutsu. But Gaara is not an opponent who can be defeated with just Taijutsu.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Destruction of the Hidden Leaf Village Begins! : During the match, someone has used Genjutsu to put everyone in the arena to sleep. The Sand Ninja led by Orochimaru have begun their plan to destroy the Hidden Leaf Village.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Village in Distress: A New A-Ranked Mission! : The Sound and Sand Ninja, along with Orochimaru, begin their move to destroy Hidden Leaf Village. The arena has become a battleground.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: A Shirker's Call to Action: Layabout No More! : Along with Pakkun, Naruto, Sakura and Shikamaru are in hot pursuit of Sasuke. Pakkun senses nine of Orochimaru’s men coming after them.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: An Unrivaled Match: Hokage Battle Royal! : Orochimaru traps the Hokage inside a barrier and they continue to battle.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: A Mistake from the Past: A Face Revealed! : Sasuke finally catches up to Gaara, Temari, and Kankuro. Kankuro escapes with Gaara leaving Temari to face Sasuke.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Forbiden Secret Technique: Reaper Death Seal! : The battle between the Hokage and Orochimaru rages on. Finally, the Hokage resorts to a Jutsu unknown to Orochimaru, the Sealing Jutsu known as “Reaper Death Seal.”

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Astonishing Truth! Gaara's Identity Emerges! : Shino appears as Sasuke and Kankuro battle. Leaving Shino to handle Kankuro, Sasuke goes after Gaara.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Sasuke's Decision: Pushed to the Edge! : Half of Gaara’s body has transformed and Sasuke continues his battle against him.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Assassin of the Moonlit Night : By the time Naruto and Sakura catch up, Sasuke has exhausted his strength and collapsed.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Light Vs Dark: The Two Faces of Gaara : Naruto is helpless against Gara’s immense power. While Naruto declares that he fights for his comrades, Gaara says he fights for himself.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto's Ninja Handbook! : Naruto is helpless against Gaara’s overpowering strength. However, after seeing Sasuke risking life and limb to save him and Sakura…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Beyond the Limit of Darkness and Light : Gaara employs his Playing Possum Jutsu, which allows the Sand Spirit within him, Shukaku, to display its true power.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Third Hokage, Forever... : With every ounce of their power, Gaara and Naruto continue to fight. Determined to protect Sakura, Naruto attacks Gaara again and again.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Return of the Morning Mist : Orochimaru's plan to destroy the Village Hidden in the Leaves is stopped.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Sharingan Vs. Sharingan! : Kakashi arrives in the nick of time to help Asuma and Kurenai, and Itachi, too, enters the fray.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Jirayia: Naruto's Potential Disaster : Jiraiya and Naruto are on a journey to find Tsunade, one of the legendary Sannin.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Roar, Chidori! Brother Vs. Brother! : Intent on confronting Itachi, Sasuke rushes to the town where Naruto is staying.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Hate Among the Uchihas: The Last of the Clan : Jiraiya saves Naruto from Kisame just in time.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: A New Training Begins: I Will Be Strong! : Deeply hurt mentally and physically, Sasuke is taken back to the Hidden Leaf Village by Guy.

programme.title: Comedy Legends from The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Ep. 13: Burns and Schreiber, Thelma Lee, Topo Gigio, Alan King : Burns and Schreiber's "Taxi Cab"; Thelma Lee's "Fur Coat, Husband, Kids and the Suburbs"; Topo Gigio's "Artist"; Alan King's "Wives and Driving"

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: Comic Legends Of The '50s - George Burns (11/30/76) : George Burns takes on Groucho Marx and young people and Rodney Dangerfield continues to get no respect. Plus, Johnny talks with Michael Constantine and Shana Alexander.

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: Hollywood Icons Of The '70s - Lilly Tomlin (2/20/75) : Lily Tomlin describes her Detroit childhood, creating a character by working a check-out counter and her career as a shoplifter.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S2 E27 - Robert Goulet : Carol is caught between two handsome men with Lyle and guest Robert Goulet join her for the Q&A. Sketches include the aftermath of a raucous party, and a maid entranced by a self-absorbed star.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S2 E21 - Ethel Merman, Tim Conway : Guest Tim Conway breaks up Harvey in one of the series' all-time funniest sketches: "The Dentist." Also: jealous understudy Carol looks to steal the show from a Broadway star (guest Ethel Merman.)

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S7 E18 - Joel Grey, Vincent Price : Life is a cabaret when Joel Grey and Vincent Price are guest starring! The two play guests at a hotel where Carol is the switchboard operator (who listens in on all the calls.) Also: "Carol & Sis."

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S9 E9 - Family Show : Tonight's sketches find Carol struggling with so-called "Easy Open" packaging, Harvey and Tim in a spoof of Jacques Cousteau, and Carol and Vicki as friends torn apart by fortune cookies.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S5 E12 - Eydie Gorme, Shecky Greene : Guests Shecky Greene and Eydie Gorme join Harvey and Carol for a rundown of some of the other television programs on the air. Also: "Carol & Sis" and the flop detective show "Ironstreet & Wife."

programme.title: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show Ep. 66 : Ed Sullivan presents The Young Rascals, Harry James and His Orchestra, Paul Anka, Roger Tay, Chong and Mana, and Topo Gigio.
