programme.desc: Ep. 13: Burns and Schreiber, Thelma Lee, Topo Gigio, Alan King : Burns and Schreiber's "Taxi Cab"; Thelma Lee's "Fur Coat, Husband, Kids and the Suburbs"; Topo Gigio's "Artist"; Alan King's "Wives and Driving"

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: The Johnny Carson Show: Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - John Larroquette (5/10/90) : John Larroquette tells Johnny how to deal with autograph seekers. Then Johnny tries to do a split with Olympian Kurt Thomas.

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: The Best Of Richard Pryor (10/9/86) : Newly slender super-comic Richard Pryor discusses dropping 20 pounds for a movie role and driving his Ferrari across the US. Madonna spouse Sean Pean chats about life with the Material Girl.

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: The Johnny Carson Show: The Best Of Carnac (4/9/81) : Albert Brooks and Susan Sarandon head to the couch for conversation topics ranging from how to know when you're in love to clam shucking.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S1 E24 - Garry Moore, Durward Kirby : Garry Moore and Durward Kirby team up with Carol and the gang for the evening, appearing in the sketch "Science Fiction Playhouse." Meanwhile, "Carol & Sis" features Carol three sheets to the wind.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S8 E19 - Family Show : Tonight's episode features Harvey and Carol encountering a wishing well, and another installment of "The Family", with Eunice and Ed suffering through Mama's recuperation after an accident.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S9 E22 - Dick Van Dyke, Tony Randall : Two guests for the price of one--Dick Van Dyke and Tony Randall! Sketches include: Dick as a salesman arriving during a couple's quarrel, and Carol and Tony as marrieds with secret hand signals.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S8 E15 - Tim Conway : Tim Conway is back again as guest star in this episode, highlighted by his turn as a hapless bus boy at a "Beniha-ha" restaurant who steps into an absent chef's role...with very messy results.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S5 E1 - Jim Nabors : Jim Nabors is Carol's guest for the fifth season opener! Jim plays a chaperone who throws cold water on a romantic cruise. And Carol and Harvey are majestic in a King Henry VIII sketch.

programme.title: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show Ep. 39 : Ed Sullivan presents Gladys Knight and The Pips, Melba Moore, Richard Pryor, Connie Francis, Tel Smit, and Roy Clark.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Miami : In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Madagascar : In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Budapest : For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: New Jersey : In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Hawaii : Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Beirut : The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Burma : With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Los Angeles : Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Colombia : Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Libya : Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Canada : The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tangier : Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Peru : Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Congo : Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Spain : Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: New Mexico : New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Israel : Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Afternoon Delight
programme.desc: Afternoon Delight : A woman (Kathryn Hahn) takes her husband to a strip club to spice up their marriage. After she gets a private dance from a sexy blond dancer (Juno Temple), she invites the gal to work for her as a live-in nanny.

programme.title: 99 Homes
programme.desc: 99 Homes : A desperate construction worker (Andrew Garfield) reluctantly accepts a job with the ruthless real-estate broker (Michael Shannon) who evicted him and his family from their home.

programme.title: A War
programme.desc: A War : A Danish commander (Pilou Asbæk) faces a courtroom trial after a judgment call leads to the deaths of 11 civilians during the war in Afghanistan.

programme.title: Last Rampage
programme.desc: Last Rampage : Gary Tison, imprisoned for murder, makes one last dash for freedom with the help of his trusting and loyal family. Commanding his three sons, Tison and his gang leave a trail of bodies in their wake as they do all they can to reach the border.

programme.title: The Humbling
programme.desc: The Humbling : Following a breakdown and suicide attempt, an aging actor (Al Pacino) becomes involved with a much younger woman but soon finds that it's difficult to keep pace with her.

programme.title: The Night Crew
programme.desc: The Night Crew : Desperate bounty hunters have to survive the night in a desert motel against a horde of savage border runners.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Void : Voyager is sucked into an inescapable subspace void which is inhabited only by other trapped vessels battling each other for survival.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Shouldn't Have Left Her : When Raines' sister goes missing in Kosovo, he goes rogue to find her, putting his job and his life on the line. Also, Kellett and Forrester face further scrutiny from inside the Bureau.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Left of Boom : The Fly Team lands in hot water when Vo is found at the scene where a Hungarian gambling regulator was murdered.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Green Birds : After eight people are fatally poisoned at a deli in New York City, agents Maggie Bell and OA Zidan trace the crime to an unlikely culprit and conduct a sting operation to prevent further attacks.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Prey : Special agents Maggie Bell and OA Zidan join the team to investigate the murders of 18 young women, and they get help from a survivor associated with the deceased.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Crossfire : As the body count continues to rise, Maggie Bell and OA Zidan rush to track down an active sniper who has an elusive motive.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: Ars Moriendi : After witnessing a murder in broad daylight, the Fugitive Task Force must hunt down a team of killers competing in a twisted online game. Meanwhile, Remy and Abby struggle to get on the same page.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: Do You Realize?? : The Fugitive Task Force is sent on a hunt in Philadelphia to investigate a double homicide and the abduction of a 14-year-old girl in the foster care system. Meanwhile, Ray's father is hospitalized after an accident while helping out around the house.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: 68 Seconds : Remy calls in the Fugitive Task Force after ex-girlfriend judge April Brooks is assaulted by a serial rapist. Meanwhile, Remy decides to take the next step in his relationship with Abby after her case in New York winds down.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Uprooting : When an American vintner is shot and killed on his wine estate in France, the Fly Team must determine if the region's local protest group with a history of violence against foreigners is to blame.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: On These Waters : Following a frenzied attack by gunmen aboard an American-owned river cruise ship on the Danube, the Fly Team heads to Vienna to investigate why the boat was targeted. Also, Forrester realizes his feelings of mistrust are affecting personal relationships.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Get That Revolution Started : The Fly Team works to hunt down the sniper responsible for killing an American during an attack targeting a biomedical lab in Belgium. Also, Jaeger clashes with her boss at Europol over her allegiance to the Fly Team.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Evolution (Part 2) : Having found the location of the warrior base, Carter is assigned a recon mission to determine Anubis's plans. Meanwhile, O'Neill mounts a mission to South America to rescue Daniel who has been kidnapped by Honduran rebels demanding a ransom.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Grace : Having sustained an injury during an alien attack, Carter awakens to find herself abandoned on the Prometheus and trapped. With only her subconscious as a guide, Carter must find a way out of the nebula before it destroys the ship and her way home.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Fallout : Jonas Quinn returns to the SGC with news that Naquadria mines of Kelowna are not native to his world and are threatening to cause an explosion in the planet's core that will leave his home world uninhabitable and millions dead.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Human : Disregarding orders, Dr. Rush links himself to the Destiny’s computer via the neural interface chair, hoping it will reveal the code needed to control Destiny’s flight path. Learning of this, Col. Young struggles with letting Rush risk his life.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Lost : Trapped beneath ruins in an underground maze, some of the Destiny's crew are stranded when the ship jumps back into FTL. The situation grows even more desperate when Rush (Robert Carlyle) learns that Destiny will soon be leaving the galaxy!

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Sabotage : With crew members stranded, Destiny continues to cross from the present galaxy into the next one. Unable to alter the Destiny's course, Dr. Rush calculates the Destiny will fall short of making it to the next galaxy, stranding them indefinitely.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Pain : Members of the crew begin experiencing disturbingly realistic hallucinations. With the hallucinations spreading to other members of the crew, Dr. Johansen (Alaina Huffman) must track down whatever is causing the episodes before someone dies.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Birthright : SG-1 encounters a race of women warriors whose survival depends on symbiotes harvested from Jaffa. Teal'c and SG-1 must convince the warriors' high priestess to put aside her fear of reliance on a life-saving drug before the Goa'uld destroy them.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Evolution (Part 1) : SG-1 encounters a very advanced bio-engineered warrior endowed with super strength, created by Anubis. While the team sets out to locate the origin of this new foe, Daniel travels to South America in search of a device left on Earth by the Ancients.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

channel.display-name: Puto TV Classic TV Crime Drama

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Brother's Keeper : Old family conflicts resurface when Officer Luann Corbin's brother Tyler is released from prison and moves back home, driving a wedge between Luann, who thinks it’s a bad idea and that Tyler will never change, and her mother, who welcomes him.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Frenzied Affair : Obsessed with his ex-girlfriend, a disturbed teenager kills her new boyfriend and pins the murder on her stepfather. Althea sees the teen’s hostility at school and realizes how dangerous he is. Can he be stopped from making one more fatal mistake?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Discovery : Althea Tibbs struggles with depression after witnessing the shocking suicide of a student, and the dead teen’s ex-girlfriend starts dating a guy with a criminal record, who she’s desperate to flee Sparta with to escape from her abusive stepfather.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Random's Child : Gillespie is reunited with his daughter Lana, when she comes to Sparta to settle her inheritance, but she’s been followed by her mother’s ex-boyfriend, who claims that it all belongs to him, and he’s willing to take drastic measures to collect.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: An Occupational Hazard : Rose Murphy is sexually assaulted at work by her boss and, fending off another attack, she kills him. When she confesses the shooting to her husband, he makes it look like a failed robbery. A pair of thieves are arrested, but the clues don’t add up.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Last Rights : Morphine tablets have been disappearing from Newton General Hospital, and Tibbs' investigation into the suspicious deaths of terminally ill patients at that facility leads him to believe his Aunt Ruda's own physician, Dr. Lambert, might be involved.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When The Music Stopped : Bubba learns the disappointing truth that Eddie Larran, the country singer he idolizes, might have stolen his biggest hit, leaving his former writing partner, Ace McCabe, with none of the wealth derived from the song. Robert Goulet guest stars.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Flowers From A Lady : Serena Grimes, the victim of a violent armed robbery, becomes obsessed with Bubba Skinner when she misinterprets his kindness for romance. Soon, flowers arrive at the station for Bubba, amusing Gillespie and the staff, until the stalking begins.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Private Sessions : When the drowned body of Rebecca Lewis is found washed up on a riverbank, her friend and Tibbs’ law school buddy, Mark Meyers is the prime suspect based on an eyewitness account. He’s arrested for murder, but Tibbs doesn’t think that Mark is guilty.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Judgement Day : When a judge running for Congress refuses to grant his wife a divorce, she threatens to reveal a secret from his past that would ruin his chances for election. Then, she’s found dead as part of a failed robbery, and the judge claims he has an alibi.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Falsely Accused : Officer Wilson Sweet is accused of allegedly soliciting a bribe when he arrests Bob Pinkney, a shady car salesman, and his buddy Al Merck after they drunkenly crash an event honoring D.A. Gerard Darnelle and cause a disturbance when asked to leave.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A Step Removed : Parker’s stepfather, Roy Eversole, is not a perfect man; he drinks too much, fights too much, and now he’s suspected of murdering his ex-boss, Norbert Clemmons, after losing his job. Parker can’t believe it, and neither can Gillespie. So who did it?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Deadly Affection : A nasty slumlord threatening to evict a single mother and her daughter is later suspected of murder, but Gillespie’s hands are tied as this is Sheriff McComb’s case. Meanwhile, Parker has a new speed gun and he’s become the most hated man in Sparta.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The Leftover Man (Part 1) : The shooting of the campaign manager of a white supremacist politician appears to be a botched assassination attempt on the Senate candidate himself, but it soon reveals a web of deceit and betrayal. Was the assassination botched intentionally?

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A Passion for Justice : Renowned English novelist Charles Dickens comes to Virginia City. In short order, he is accused of a crime he didn't commit. The problem then becomes how to convince the stubborn author to defend himself.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A Question of Strength : Hoss and a pair of nuns, the younger one having a difficult time training for the order, are robbed and stranded at a way station.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Toy Soldier : Adam encounters drunken artist James Callan, branded a "squaw man" because he is married to an Indian, and whose talent is going to waste in the town of Sheep Head.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Twilight Town : Joe is bushwhacked in the desert and awakens to find himself in Martinville, a town that may or may not be populated by ghosts. An eerie, surrealistic and well-produced episode.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Waiting Game : Adam becomes involved with the recently widowed Laura Dayton and her little girl, Peggy.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Calamity over the Comstock : Joe has a run-in with Calamity Jane, and takes her home with him after promising her dying father to take care of her.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Journey Remembered : Ben finds an old journal that he kept while in a wagon train travelling from St. Joseph, Missouri to Ash Hollow.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Quality of Mercy : Joe struggles to understand whether his friend was right in killing a dying man who pleaded to put out of his misery.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ponderosa Matador : Adam, Hoss, and Joe vie for the attention of a pretty young lady named Dolores. Hoss talks Joe into entering a bull fight, but it doesn't work out quite as planned.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Legacy : Adam, Hoss and Joe mistakenly believe their father was murdered. They split into 3 different directions to confront the supposed killers.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Prime of Life : Ben becomes irritable and reckless when the completion of an important timber contract is hindered by an old rival.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Lila Conrad Story : Joe and Adam protect a saloon girl, who has killed in self-defense, from an angry lynch mob.

programme.title: Bonanza
